0.name: Chicken Biryani
instructions: Soak rice for 30 minutes, then parboil with whole spices until 70% done.
Fry onions in oil until golden brown, remove half for garnish.
Add chicken to remaining onions, cook with yogurt and all spices for 20 minutes.
Layer parboiled rice over chicken in pot.
Drizzle saffron milk and fried onions on top.
Cover tightly and cook on low flame (dum) for 25 minutes.
Mix gently and serve hot with raita.

1.name: Beef Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in a wok (karahi), add cumin seeds.
Add beef and ginger-garlic paste, cook on high heat for 10 minutes.
Add tomatoes and yogurt, cook until oil separates.
Add all spices and green chilies, simmer for 30 minutes until beef is tender.
Garnish with ginger, coriander, and serve with naan.

2.name: Nihari
instructions: Heat oil, fry onions and ginger-garlic paste for 5 minutes.
Add beef and nihari masala, cook on high for 10 minutes.
Add 6 cups water, slow cook for 3-4 hours until meat is very tender.
Mix flour in water, add to thicken gravy.
Simmer 15 more minutes, garnish with ginger, chilies, and coriander.
Serve with naan.

3.name: Halwa Puri
instructions: For halwa: heat ghee, roast semolina until golden.
Add sugar dissolved in warm water, stir continuously until thick.
Add cardamom, cook until it leaves sides of pan.
For puri: knead flour with baking powder and salt into stiff dough.
Divide into balls, roll thin, deep fry in hot oil until puffed.
Serve puri with halwa and chana.

4.name: Chana Masala
instructions: Heat oil, sauté onions and ginger-garlic paste until golden.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add all spices, cook 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas with some liquid, simmer 20 minutes.
Mash some chickpeas for thick gravy.
Garnish with coriander and lemon.

5.name: Seekh Kebab
instructions: Mix all ingredients together and knead well.
Refrigerate mixture for 30 minutes.
Shape onto skewers in long cylindrical form.
Grill on BBQ or in oven at 200°C for 15-20 minutes turning halfway.
Serve with naan, mint chutney, and salad.

6.name: Gulab Jamun
instructions: Mix milk powder, flour, baking soda, and ghee.
Add milk gradually to make soft dough.
Make sugar syrup with water, sugar, cardamom, and rose water.
Shape dough into small smooth balls.
Deep fry on low heat until dark golden.
Immediately place in warm sugar syrup for 2 hours.
Serve warm.

7.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry pancetta and garlic in olive oil until crispy.
Whisk egg yolks with Parmesan and plenty of black pepper.
Remove pan from heat, add drained pasta to pancetta.
Quickly pour egg mixture over pasta, toss vigorously.
Add pasta water to loosen if needed. Serve immediately.

8.name: Classic Pancakes
instructions: Whisk dry ingredients in one bowl.
Whisk milk, egg, butter, and vanilla in another.
Combine wet and dry ingredients — do not overmix.
Heat non-stick pan, pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake.
Cook until bubbles form on top, flip once.
Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries.

9.name: Margherita Pizza
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°C with pizza stone or baking sheet inside.
Roll out dough to 30cm circle.
Spread tomato sauce leaving 1cm border.
Tear mozzarella over sauce.
Bake 10-12 minutes until crust is golden.
Top with fresh basil and drizzle of olive oil.

10.name: Caesar Salad
ingredients: Caesar dressing: 2 anchovy fillets, 1 egg yolk, 1 lemon, 1 garlic clove, 1 tsp Dijon, olive oil
instructions: Blend all dressing ingredients, slowly drizzle in olive oil while blending.
Tear lettuce into large pieces.
Toss lettuce with dressing until well coated.
Add Parmesan and croutons.
Serve immediately.

11.name: Vegetable Fried Rice
instructions: Heat oil in wok on high heat.
Scramble eggs, set aside.
Add garlic, then carrot and peas, stir-fry 3 minutes.
Add rice, break up clumps.
Pour soy sauce and sesame oil, toss well.
Add eggs back, mix and garnish with spring onions.

12.name: Mutton Korma
instructions: Fry onions in ghee until golden, make paste.
Cook mutton with ginger-garlic paste until sealed.
Add onion paste, yogurt, and korma masala.
Cook on medium heat for 45 minutes until mutton is tender.
Add cream and saffron milk, simmer 10 minutes.
Garnish with fried onions and serve with naan.

13.name: French Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs with salt and pepper until uniform.
Heat butter in 20cm pan until foamy.
Pour in eggs, immediately start stirring with spatula.
When eggs just set, stop stirring and let bottom set slightly.
Add fillings if using, fold omelette in thirds.
Slide onto plate — should be pale yellow, not browned.

14.name: Shahi Tukray
instructions: Remove bread crusts, cut into triangles, deep fry until golden.
Reduce milk with sugar, cardamom, and saffron to half quantity.
Add khoya and rose water, stir well.
Pour reduced milk over fried bread in serving dish.
Top with pistachios and almonds.
Refrigerate 2 hours before serving.

15.name: Lemon Tart
instructions: Blind-bake pastry shell at 180°C for 15 minutes.
Whisk eggs and sugar, add lemon zest and juice.
Melt butter and cream, mix into egg mixture.
Pour into baked shell.
Bake at 150°C for 25 minutes until just set with a slight wobble.
Cool completely, dust with icing sugar.

16.name: Butter Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices, grill until charred.
In butter, cook ginger-garlic paste, add tomato puree.
Add spices and simmer 15 minutes.
Blend sauce smooth, return to pan.
Add grilled chicken and cream.
Simmer 10 minutes, serve with naan.

17.name: Grilled Salmon
instructions: Mix olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, and thyme.
Rub over salmon fillets, let sit 15 minutes.
Heat grill pan on high heat.
Cook salmon skin-side up for 4 minutes, flip.
Cook 3 more minutes — should flake easily.
Serve with lemon juice and capers.

18.name: Mango Kulfi
instructions: Dissolve cornflour in a little milk.
Boil remaining milk, reduce to 3/4 quantity stirring often.
Add sugar, cardamom, and cornflour mixture.
Cook 5 minutes until thick, cool completely.
Stir in mango puree.
Pour into kulfi molds, freeze overnight.
Unmold under warm water, garnish with pistachios.

19.name: Achari Chicken
instructions: Temper fennel, nigella, and fenugreek seeds in mustard oil.
Add chicken, cook on high until sealed.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add yogurt and achari masala, mix well.
Cook on medium until chicken is done.
Garnish with green chilies and coriander.

20.name: Kofta Curry
instructions: Mix mince with egg, half ginger-garlic paste, salt, and spices. Form balls.
In oil, fry onions until golden, add ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomatoes and spices, make thick masala.
Add koftas gently, do not stir for 5 minutes.
Cover and simmer 25 minutes until cooked through.
Garnish and serve.

21.name: Mutter Pulao
instructions: Soak rice 30 minutes.
In oil, fry onions and whole spices until golden.
Add peas, stir 2 minutes.
Add drained rice, fry 3 minutes.
Add water/broth and salt, bring to boil.
Cover tightly, cook on low 15 minutes.
Rest covered 10 minutes, fluff with fork.

22.name: Strawberry Cheesecake
ingredients: Filling: 600g cream cheese, 150g sugar, 3 eggs, 1 tsp vanilla, 200ml sour cream
Strawberry topping: 300g strawberries, 2 tbsp sugar, lemon juice
instructions: Crush biscuits, mix with melted butter, press into springform pan, chill.
Beat cream cheese and sugar smooth, add eggs one at a time.
Add vanilla and sour cream, pour over base.
Bake at 160°C for 55 minutes, cool in oven.
Refrigerate overnight.
Cook strawberries with sugar for topping, cool, pour over cheesecake.

23.name: Dahi Vada
instructions: Soak dal overnight, blend with minimal water to thick batter.
Add salt, beat until fluffy.
Deep fry spoonfuls in hot oil until golden.
Soak vadas in warm water 20 minutes, squeeze gently.
Arrange in serving dish, cover with yogurt.
Drizzle both chutneys, sprinkle spices.

24.name: Acai Bowl
ingredients: Toppings: granola, sliced banana, honey, coconut flakes, fresh berries
instructions: Blend frozen acai, banana, blueberries, and almond milk on high.
Mixture should be very thick — like soft-serve ice cream.
Pour into bowl.
Arrange toppings in sections for visual appeal.
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

25.name: Zinger Burger
instructions: Marinate chicken in buttermilk + hot sauce 4+ hours.
Mix flour with cayenne, paprika, garlic powder, salt.
Coat chicken thoroughly in seasoned flour.
Deep fry at 170°C for 8-10 minutes until golden and cooked.
Toast buns, spread mayo.
Layer coleslaw and crispy chicken fillet.

26.name: Ras Malai
instructions: Curdle milk with lemon juice, drain through muslin.
Knead chenna until smooth, shape into flat discs.
Boil discs in sugar syrup (1 cup sugar, 3 cups water) for 15 minutes.
For rabri, reduce 2L milk to half with sugar and saffron.
Squeeze syrup from discs, add to cooled rabri.
Refrigerate 3+ hours, garnish with pistachios.

27.name: Eggs Florentine
instructions: Sauté spinach with garlic and butter, season with nutmeg.
Toast muffins.
Poach eggs to desired doneness.
Place spinach on muffin halves.
Top with poached egg.
Spoon hollandaise over.

28.name: Watermelon Feta Salad
instructions: Cut watermelon into triangles or cubes.
Slice cucumber and red onion.
Arrange watermelon and cucumber on platter.
Crumble feta over.
Scatter mint leaves and arugula.
Drizzle olive oil and balsamic, season with pepper.

29.name: Hot Dog
instructions: Grill or boil hot dogs until heated through.
Toast buns if desired.
Place hot dog in bun.
Add ketchup and mustard.
Top with caramelized onions and pickles.
Add sauerkraut, jalapeños and cheese to taste.

30.name: Chicken Tikka
instructions: Make cuts in chicken.
Marinate in spiced yogurt 4-6 hours.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill over hot coals or in oven at 220°C.
Cook until charred and cooked through.
Serve with mint chutney, naan and salad.

31.name: Tres Leches Cake
ingredients: For soaking: condensed milk, evaporated milk, heavy cream
instructions: Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold in yolks and sugar.
Fold in flour and baking powder.
Bake at 175°C for 25 minutes.
Mix three milks, poke cake all over, pour over hot cake.
Refrigerate 4 hours until soaked.
Top with whipped cream and strawberries.

32.name: Roasted Garlic Bread
instructions: Roast garlic in foil at 180°C for 40 minutes.
Squeeze roasted garlic into butter.
Add parsley, parmesan and salt.
Slice bread at an angle without cutting through.
Spread garlic butter in each cut.
Wrap in foil, bake 15 minutes, open foil last 5 minutes.

33.name: Malai Kulfi
instructions: Reduce milk to half by simmering.
Add condensed milk, cream and sugar.
Add cardamom, saffron and most nuts.
Cool completely.
Pour into kulfi molds or cups.
Freeze overnight until completely solid.

34.name: Beef Burger
ingredients: Burger sauce: mayo, ketchup, mustard, relish
instructions: Season beef with salt and pepper, form into patties.
Make an indent in center of each patty.
Grill on high heat 3-4 minutes per side.
Add cheese last minute.
Toast buns.
Assemble with sauce and all toppings.

35.name: Stuffed Parathas
ingredients: For filling options: mashed potato, minced beef, or white radish with spices
instructions: Make soft dough, divide into balls.
Make filling of choice with spices.
Roll each ball, place filling in center.
Seal and re-roll gently.
Cook on hot griddle with ghee.
Flip and cook until golden spots appear.

36.name: Watermelon Cucumber Salad
instructions: Cube watermelon and slice cucumber.
Thinly slice red onion.
Mix lime juice, honey and chili flakes for dressing.
Combine watermelon, cucumber and onion.
Add dressing and toss.
Top with feta, mint and a pinch of salt.

37.name: Chicken Broast
ingredients: 1 tsp each: garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, cayenne, oregano, salt, pepper
Oil for pressure frying or deep frying
instructions: Marinate chicken in buttermilk and hot sauce overnight.
Mix flour with all spices.
Dredge chicken in spiced flour.
Pressure fry at 175°C for 8-10 minutes, or deep fry 12-15 minutes.
Drain on rack.
Serve with fries and coleslaw.

38.name: Chocolate Fondue
ingredients: For dipping: strawberries, banana, marshmallows, bread cubes, biscotti
instructions: Heat cream until just simmering.
Pour over chopped chocolate.
Stir until smooth.
Add butter and vanilla.
Pour into fondue pot.
Keep warm over flame, serve with dipping items.

39.name: Dahi Chaat
instructions: Arrange papdi in shallow dish.
Add chickpeas and potatoes.
Pour yogurt over.
Drizzle both chutneys generously.
Sprinkle chaat masala, cumin and chili.
Top with sev and pomegranate seeds.

40.name: Chicken Corn Chowder
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add chicken, cook until white.
Add potatoes, corn and broth.
Simmer 20 minutes until potatoes soft.
Stir in cream.
Simmer 5 more minutes, season and garnish.

41.name: Roghan Josh
instructions: Fry onions until deeply golden.
Add lamb and brown well.
Add Kashmiri chili and other dry spices.
Add yogurt and cook until oil separates.
Add water and simmer 60 minutes until lamb tender.
Serve with steamed rice.

42.name: Chocolate Brownie
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C, line square tin.
Melt chocolate and butter together.
Whisk eggs, sugar and vanilla until thick.
Fold in chocolate mixture.
Fold in flour, cocoa and salt.
Add chocolate chips, bake 22-25 minutes.

43.name: Zafrani Rice
instructions: Soak rice 30 minutes, boil with whole spices until done.
Dissolve saffron in warm milk.
Drain rice, drizzle saffron milk over.
Add ghee, sugar and rose water.
Mix gently, cover and steam 10 minutes.
Garnish with pistachios.

44.name: Cauliflower Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add cauliflower and broth.
Simmer until cauliflower very soft.
Blend until smooth.
Return to heat, add milk and cheese.
Simmer gently, season and serve with croutons.

45.name: Seekh Paratha Roll
instructions: Cook paratha on griddle until golden.
Lay flat on work surface.
Spread mint chutney and ketchup.
Place lettuce and tomato.
Add seekh kebab.
Add onion rings, green chilies and lemon, roll tightly.

46.name: Carrot Halwa
instructions: Fry carrots in ghee 10 minutes.
Add milk and cook until absorbed.
Add sugar and continue cooking.
Add khoya and cardamom, cook until thick.
Garnish with nuts.
Serve hot or at room temperature.

47.name: Aam Panna
instructions: Boil raw mangoes until soft.
Peel and extract pulp.
Blend pulp with sugar, cumin and black salt.
Mix concentrate with cold water.
Adjust sweetness and tartness.
Serve over ice with mint leaves.

48.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
instructions: Preheat oven with pizza stone to highest.
Stretch dough thin.
Spread BBQ sauce instead of tomato.
Add mozzarella and cheddar.
Top with chicken, onion and jalapenos.
Bake 10-12 minutes, add cilantro after baking.

49.name: Lamb Kofta Kebab
instructions: Mix lamb with all herbs and spices.
Knead well, refrigerate 30 minutes.
Shape onto flat skewers.
Grill over charcoal or in oven.
Cook turning until evenly done.
Serve with pita, tomatoes and yogurt.

50.name: Egg Paratha
instructions: Make soft dough, rest 30 minutes.
Roll into thin circles.
Whisk egg with onion, chilies, coriander and salt.
Pour egg mix on rolled paratha on hot griddle.
Flip carefully, press and cook until golden.
Serve with yogurt and pickle.

51.name: Chocolate Soufflé
instructions: Make thick chocolate sauce with butter, flour, milk and chocolate.
Beat egg yolks with sugar, add to sauce.
Whip egg whites to stiff peaks.
Fold whites into chocolate mixture in thirds.
Pour into buttered ramekins.
Bake at 190°C for 12-14 minutes, serve immediately.

52.name: Fish Biryani
instructions: Marinate fish in yogurt and biryani masala 1 hour.
Cook fish masala carefully without breaking fish.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer rice and fish masala.
Add fried onions, saffron and ghee.
Steam 15 minutes, serve gently.

53.name: Karak Chai
instructions: Boil water with cardamom and cinnamon.
Add tea leaves, boil 5 minutes.
Add evaporated milk and sugar.
Bring to rolling boil, lower heat.
Simmer until creamy brown, 5 more minutes.
Strain and serve in small cups.

54.name: Falafel
instructions: Pulse chickpeas, onion, garlic and herbs in processor.
Add spices and flour, mix to cohesive paste.
Refrigerate 30 minutes.
Shape into balls or patties.
Deep fry until deep golden brown.
Serve in pita with tahini and salad.

55.name: Shish Tawook
instructions: Mix marinade with yogurt, tomato paste, lemon and spices.
Marinate chicken 4 hours.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill over medium high heat.
Cook 12-15 minutes turning.
Serve with garlic sauce and pita.

56.name: Egg Rolls
instructions: Cook filling: meat, vegetables with garlic, ginger and soy sauce.
Cool completely.
Place filling on wrapper diagonally.
Fold sides in and roll tightly.
Seal with beaten egg.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.

57.name: Roasted Beet Salad
instructions: Wrap beets in foil, roast at 200°C 45 minutes.
Cool and peel, cut into wedges.
Toast walnuts lightly.
Arrange arugula on platter.
Add beets, orange segments and onion.
Crumble goat cheese, add walnuts, dress with balsamic.

58.name: Creamy Mushroom Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta al dente.
Sauté onion and garlic in butter until soft.
Add mushrooms, cook until golden.
Add wine, cook 3 minutes.
Add cream and simmer.
Toss with pasta, add parmesan and herbs.

59.name: Mango Pickle
instructions: Mix mango slices with salt and turmeric, sun dry 2 days.
Roast and coarsely grind mustard, fennel and fenugreek.
Mix ground spices with chili powder.
Heat mustard oil until smoking, cool.
Mix spices into oil.
Add mango, mix well, store in jar, mature 1 week.

60.name: Black Forest Cake
instructions: Soak cake layers with cherry syrup.
Whip cream with sugar to stiff peaks.
Layer: cake, cream, cherries, cake.
Frost outside with cream.
Decorate with chocolate shavings.
Top with fresh cherries.

61.name: Kachumber Salad
instructions: Finely dice all vegetables uniformly.
Chop coriander finely.
Combine all in bowl.
Squeeze lemon juice.
Add chaat masala and salt.
Mix well and serve fresh alongside curry.

62.name: Lamb Shank
instructions: Brown shanks all over in hot oil.
Sauté onions and garlic.
Add wine and reduce.
Add tomatoes, broth and herbs.
Return shanks, braise at 160°C for 3 hours.
Serve on mashed potato with braising sauce.

63.name: Imli Chutney
instructions: Soak tamarind in warm water 30 minutes.
Squeeze to extract pulp, strain.
Cook pulp with sugar on medium heat.
Add all spices and stir.
Simmer until desired consistency.
Cool and store in jar.

64.name: Chicken Kathi Roll
instructions: Cook paratha on griddle.
Pour beaten egg on one side before removing.
Spread mint chutney on egg side.
Layer chicken tikka, onions and peppers.
Squeeze lemon, sprinkle chaat masala.
Roll tightly and wrap in paper.

65.name: Tamatar Gosht
instructions: Heat oil, add ginger garlic paste.
Add mutton and brown well.
Add whole tomatoes cut in quarters.
Add spices, stir well.
Cook covered on low heat 60 minutes.
Uncover, cook until tomatoes melt and oil separates.

66.name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add flour and cook 1 minute.
Add broth gradually, stir.
Add broccoli, simmer 15 minutes.
Blend partially for thick texture.
Add cream and cheese, stir until melted.

67.name: Creamy Tomato Pasta
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, sugar and chili.
Simmer 20 minutes, blend until smooth.
Add cream and basil, simmer 5 minutes.
Toss with cooked pasta.
Serve with parmesan.

68.name: Chicken Sandwich
instructions: Marinate chicken in buttermilk and hot sauce 2 hours.
Dredge in seasoned flour.
Fry until golden and cooked through.
Toast buns.
Spread mayo on both sides.
Assemble with pickles and lettuce.

69.name: Badaam Doodh
instructions: Blend blanched almonds with a little milk to fine paste.
Heat remaining milk until hot.
Add almond paste, stirring constantly.
Add sugar, saffron and cardamom.
Simmer 5 minutes.
Add rose water, serve hot or chilled with pistachios.

70.name: Beef Steak
ingredients: Salt and black pepper coarsely ground
instructions: Pat steaks dry, season generously with salt and pepper.
Heat cast iron pan until very hot.
Sear steaks 3-4 minutes per side.
Add butter, garlic and herbs, baste continuously.
Rest 5 minutes before cutting.
Serve with sautéed mushrooms.

71.name: Opera Cake
ingredients: Joconde sponge: almond flour, eggs, sugar
Coffee buttercream: butter, egg yolks, sugar, espresso
instructions: Make joconde sponge and cut into equal rectangles.
Brush each layer with coffee syrup.
Layer: sponge, buttercream, sponge, ganache, sponge, buttercream.
Chill until set.
Pour thin ganache over top to glaze.
Chill, dust with cocoa and slice neatly.

72.name: Chapli Kebab
instructions: Mix beef with onion, tomatoes, green chilies and egg.
Add all spices and cornflour, mix well.
Refrigerate 1 hour.
Shape into flat round patties.
Fry in oil on medium heat until golden brown each side.
Serve with naan and mint chutney.

73.name: Vegetable Samosa
instructions: Fry cumin seeds, add peas and spices, mix with potatoes.
Add coriander and amchur, cool filling completely.
Shape pastry into cones, fill with 2 tbsp mixture.
Seal edges with flour-water paste.
Deep fry in medium hot oil until golden and crisp.
Serve hot with chutney.

74.name: Pho Bo (Beef Pho)
ingredients: Bean sprouts, basil, lime to serve
instructions: Char onion and ginger directly over flame.
Simmer bones in water 3 hours, skim foam.
Add charred aromatics and whole spices, cook 1 more hour.
Strain broth, season with fish sauce and salt.
Cook brisket in broth until tender, slice thinly.
Soak noodles per package instructions.
Assemble: noodles + sliced beef + hot broth. Serve with garnishes.

75.name: Falooda
instructions: Cook falooda sev per package, cool.
Soak basil seeds in water 20 minutes.
In tall glass, layer rose syrup, sev, and basil seeds.
Pour cold milk.
Top with ice cream scoop.
Add jelly and nuts, serve with long spoon.

76.name: Palak Gosht
instructions: Cook mutton with onions, ginger-garlic paste, and spices until meat is tender.
Blanch spinach, blend coarsely.
Add spinach to meat, mix well.
Add tomatoes, cook until oil rises.
Adjust seasoning and simmer 15 minutes.
Serve with roti.

77.name: Chicken Chow Mein
ingredients: 2 cups mixed vegetables (cabbage, carrots, bell peppers)
instructions: Cook noodles until just done, drain and toss with oil.
Stir fry chicken in hot oil until cooked, set aside.
Add garlic and vegetables, stir fry 3 minutes.
Add noodles and sauces, toss everything together.
Return chicken, add sesame oil.
Serve hot.

78.name: Mango Pudding
instructions: Bloom gelatin in cold water 5 minutes.
Whip cream with sugar to soft peaks.
Warm gelatin mixture to dissolve, cool slightly.
Fold gelatin into mango puree.
Fold cream into mango mixture gently.
Pour into glasses, refrigerate 4 hours.
Garnish with fresh mango cubes.

79.name: Sheer Khurma
instructions: Fry vermicelli in ghee until golden.
Boil milk, add fried vermicelli.
Add cardamom, cook until vermicelli is soft.
Add sugar, dates, and saffron.
Cook 10 more minutes on low heat.
Finish with rose water.
Garnish with pistachios and almonds. Serve warm.

80.name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
ingredients: Tahini dressing: tahini, lemon, garlic, water
instructions: Cook quinoa as per packet.
Roast chickpeas and sweet potato with oil and spices at 200°C for 25 minutes.
Massage kale with lemon and oil.
Whisk tahini dressing ingredients together.
Assemble bowl: quinoa base, topped with all components.
Drizzle tahini dressing and sprinkle seeds.

81.name: Creamy Tomato Soup
instructions: Roast tomatoes, onion, and garlic with oil at 200°C for 30 minutes.
Blend roasted vegetables with stock until smooth.
Pass through sieve for extra smooth texture.
Simmer 10 minutes, season with sugar, salt, and pepper.
Swirl in cream before serving.
Garnish with basil and serve with crusty bread.

82.name: Pineapple Juice
instructions: Cube pineapple flesh.
Blend with cold water until smooth.
Strain through fine sieve.
Add lime juice and sugar if needed.
Serve over ice with mint garnish.

83.name: Haleem
instructions: Soak all grains and lentils overnight.
Pressure cook meat until very tender.
In large pot, cook grains until soft, mash roughly.
Shred meat and combine with grain mixture.
Add haleem masala and cook 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
Blend partially for desired texture.
Serve topped with fried onions, ginger, green chilies, and lemon.

84.name: Daal Chawal
instructions: Boil daal with turmeric and salt until soft.
In oil, fry onions, add ginger-garlic paste, tomatoes, and spices.
Add cooked daal, mix, simmer 15 minutes.
Cook rice separately and serve alongside.
Prepare tadka: heat butter, add cumin and dry chili, pour over daal.
Garnish with coriander and green chilies.

85.name: Sushi Rolls
ingredients: Sugar and salt for rice seasoning
Soy sauce, wasabi, pickled ginger to serve
instructions: Cook and season sushi rice with vinegar, sugar, and salt. Cool to room temp.
Lay nori shiny-side down on bamboo mat.
Spread thin layer of rice over nori.
Place fish, avocado, and cucumber in a line.
Roll tightly using bamboo mat.
Slice into 8 pieces with wet sharp knife.
Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and ginger.

86.name: Peri Peri Chicken
ingredients: Peri peri sauce: dried chillies, garlic, lemon, smoked paprika, olive oil, oregano
instructions: Blend all peri peri ingredients into smooth sauce.
Score chicken and marinate in sauce overnight.
Preheat oven to 200°C.
Roast chicken 45-50 minutes until cooked.
Serve with extra sauce, chips, and coleslaw.

87.name: Baingan Bharta
instructions: Char eggplants directly on flame until fully blackened outside.
Cool, peel, and mash flesh.
In mustard oil, temper cumin seeds, add onions and ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomatoes, spices, and cook until thick.
Add mashed eggplant, mix well.
Cook 10 minutes, garnish with coriander.

88.name: Chocolate Brownies
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter together, cool.
Whisk eggs and sugar until pale.
Fold chocolate into eggs.
Sift in flour, cocoa, and salt, fold gently.
Add walnuts if using.
Pour into lined baking pan.
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes — center should still have a slight wobble.

89.name: Lemonade
instructions: Make simple syrup by dissolving sugar in 1 cup hot water. Cool.
Juice all lemons.
Combine lemon juice and syrup.
Add remaining cold water and salt.
Stir well, pour over ice.
Garnish with mint and lemon slices.

90.name: Beef Biryani
instructions: Marinate beef in yogurt and half the masala overnight.
Cook beef masala until oil separates.
Parboil rice with whole spices until 70% cooked.
Layer rice over beef, top with saffron milk and fried onions.
Seal pot and cook on dum (low heat) 30 minutes.
Mix gently, serve hot.

91.name: Waffles
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
Mix egg yolks, milk, butter, and vanilla.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold into batter.
Cook in preheated waffle iron until golden.
Serve with berries, whipped cream, or syrup.

92.name: Mutton Biryani
instructions: Slow cook mutton with masala until very tender.
Parboil rice with whole spices until 75% done.
Layer rice and meat in large pot.
Sprinkle kewra water and saffron milk.
Top with fried onions and fresh herbs.
Cook on dum for 30 minutes on lowest heat.
Serve with raita and salad.

93.name: Baked Cheesecake
ingredients: Filling: 800g cream cheese, 200g sugar, 4 eggs, 2 tsp vanilla, 200ml sour cream, 2 tbsp flour
instructions: Blitz biscuits, mix with melted butter, press into 23cm springform pan.
Beat cream cheese and sugar smooth.
Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla, flour, and sour cream.
Pour into pan, bake at 160°C (water bath) for 70 minutes.
Turn off oven, crack door open, leave 1 hour.
Refrigerate overnight before serving.

94.name: Miso Soup
instructions: Soak wakame in cold water 5 minutes, drain.
Heat dashi stock to simmering — do not boil.
Whisk miso paste into a cup of warm stock, then add back to pot.
Add tofu cubes gently.
Ladle into bowls, top with wakame and spring onions.
Do not let soup boil after adding miso.

95.name: Macaroni and Cheese
instructions: Cook macaroni until al dente, drain.
Make béchamel: melt butter, add flour, cook 2 minutes, whisk in milk.
Stir in cheeses and mustard, season well.
Mix pasta with cheese sauce.
Pour into baking dish, top with breadcrumbs.
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes until golden.

96.name: Sabzi Pulao
instructions: Soak rice 30 minutes.
Fry whole spices in ghee, add onion until golden.
Add vegetables, stir fry 5 minutes.
Add drained rice, fry 3 minutes.
Pour hot broth, bring to boil.
Cover, cook on low 15 minutes.
Rest 10 minutes, fluff and serve.

97.name: Carrot Cake
ingredients: Cream cheese frosting: 250g cream cheese, 100g icing sugar, vanilla
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, and cinnamon.
Beat sugar, eggs, and oil.
Combine wet and dry, fold in carrots.
Pour into greased cake tin, bake at 180°C for 40 minutes.
Cool completely.
Beat cream cheese, icing sugar, and vanilla for frosting.
Spread over cooled cake.

98.name: Peshwari Naan
ingredients: Filling: desiccated coconut, ground almonds, raisins, sugar
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water, mix with flour, yogurt, sugar, and salt.
Knead 10 minutes, rest 1 hour.
Mix all filling ingredients together.
Roll dough, fill with coconut mixture, seal and roll flat.
Cook in very hot tandoor or under broiler until charred spots appear.
Brush with butter and serve.

99.name: Beef Paya
instructions: Wash and clean trotters thoroughly.
In pressure cooker, add all ingredients and enough water to cover.
Cook on pressure for 1.5 hours.
Open, adjust spices, simmer until thick gravy.
Garnish generously with ginger, chilies, and coriander.
Serve with naan.

100.name: Saag Aloo
instructions: Fry potatoes until golden, drain and set aside.
In same oil, temper cumin seeds, add onion and cook golden.
Add ginger, garlic, tomatoes, and spices.
Wilt spinach in the pan.
Blend half the spinach for creamier texture.
Add potatoes, simmer 10 minutes.
Serve with roti.

101.name: Tandoori Fish
instructions: Score fish on both sides.
Mix yogurt, tandoori masala, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, lemon juice, and food coloring.
Marinate fish for 2 hours.
Grill or bake at 220°C for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle chaat masala and serve with mint chutney.

102.name: Croissant
instructions: Make dough, refrigerate overnight.
Pound butter into flat rectangle, wrap in dough.
Fold and roll 6 times with 30 min rests in fridge between.
Cut into triangles, roll from base to tip.
Proof 2 hours, egg wash.
Bake at 200°C for 18 minutes until deeply golden.

103.name: Vegetable Soup
instructions: Sauté onion in olive oil until soft.
Add carrots and celery, cook 5 minutes.
Add all remaining vegetables.
Pour in stock and tomatoes.
Add herbs, season well.
Simmer 25 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Serve with crusty bread.

104.name: Kunafa
ingredients: Sugar syrup: 2 cups sugar, 1 cup water, rose water
instructions: Mix kataifi dough with melted butter and food coloring.
Press half into buttered baking pan.
Layer cheese on top.
Cover with remaining dough, press firmly.
Bake at 180°C for 30 minutes until golden.
Flip onto serving plate, pour hot sugar syrup.
Garnish with pistachios.

105.name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
instructions: Slice grilled chicken.
Warm tortillas briefly.
Spread Caesar dressing on each tortilla.
Layer lettuce, chicken, Parmesan, and croutons.
Roll tightly into wrap, cut in half diagonally.
Serve immediately.

106.name: Moong Daal Halwa
instructions: Soak and grind daal to smooth paste.
Heat ghee, add daal paste and cook stirring continuously.
Roast on low heat until golden and fragrant — about 30 minutes.
Add warm milk gradually, stir until absorbed.
Add sugar, cook until ghee separates.
Add cardamom and saffron, garnish with nuts.

107.name: Prawn Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in wok, add ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomatoes, cook until soft.
Add prawns and all spices.
Cook on high heat 8-10 minutes — don't overcook.
Add green chilies and black pepper.
Garnish with ginger and coriander.

108.name: Beef Lasagna
ingredients: Tomato sauce: canned tomatoes, onion, garlic, herbs
instructions: Make tomato meat sauce, simmer 30 minutes.
Make béchamel sauce.
Layer in baking dish: sauce, pasta sheets, béchamel, cheese.
Repeat 3 times, finish with béchamel and cheeses.
Bake at 180°C for 45 minutes.
Rest 15 minutes before serving.

109.name: Bihari Kebab
instructions: Mix all marinade ingredients.
Coat beef slices well, marinate overnight.
Thread on skewers flat.
Grill on BBQ or tawa on high heat until charred.
Serve with mint chutney and paratha.

110.name: Rooh Afza Milk
instructions: Pour cold milk into glasses.
Add Rooh Afza syrup to each glass.
Stir well until combined.
Add ice cubes.
Garnish with mint and rose petals.
Serve chilled.

111.name: Lemon Pound Cake
ingredients: Lemon glaze: icing sugar + lemon juice
instructions: Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour, baking powder, and lemon zest.
Pour into greased loaf pan.
Bake at 170°C for 50-55 minutes.
Cool 10 minutes, drizzle with lemon glaze.

112.name: Mutter Keema
instructions: Fry onion in oil until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and tomatoes, cook until soft.
Add spices, cook 3 minutes.
Add mince, break up lumps, cook on high until browned.
Add peas, 1/2 cup water, simmer 15 minutes.
Garnish with coriander.

113.name: Mushroom Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter until soft.
Add mushrooms, cook until liquid evaporates and mushrooms are golden.
Reserve some mushrooms for garnish.
Add stock and thyme, simmer 15 minutes.
Blend until smooth.
Add cream, season, simmer 5 minutes.
Serve with reserved mushrooms and drizzle of truffle oil.

114.name: Pakistani Bhature
instructions: Combine flour, yogurt, baking soda, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
Knead into soft dough with a little water.
Rest covered for 2 hours.
Divide into balls, roll into oval shapes.
Deep fry in hot oil — they will puff up immediately.
Serve hot with chana curry.

115.name: Chocolate Milkshake
instructions: Add ice cream, milk, and chocolate syrup to blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour into tall chilled glass.
Top with whipped cream.
Drizzle extra chocolate syrup and add sprinkles.

116.name: Strawberry Tart
ingredients: Pastry cream: 500ml milk, 4 yolks, 100g sugar, 40g cornflour, vanilla
instructions: Blind bake tart shell until golden, cool.
Make pastry cream: boil milk, whisk yolks with sugar and cornflour, pour hot milk over, cook stirring until thick.
Cool pastry cream, fill tart shell.
Arrange strawberries neatly on top.
Brush with warmed apricot jam.

117.name: Baked Fish with Herbs
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Mix oil, garlic, lemon, and herbs.
Place fish in baking dish, pour herb oil over.
Scatter cherry tomatoes around fish.
Bake 15-18 minutes until fish flakes.
Finish with capers and serve.

118.name: Banana Smoothie
instructions: Slice bananas, freeze for 30 minutes for extra thickness.
Add all ingredients to blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Add ice and blend briefly.
Pour into glass and drink immediately.

119.name: Hot Chocolate
instructions: Whisk cocoa and sugar with 2 tbsp milk to smooth paste.
Heat remaining milk until just simmering.
Pour hot milk over cocoa paste, whisk.
Return to pan, add chocolate, stir until melted.
Add vanilla and salt.
Pour into mugs, top with whipped cream and marshmallows.

120.name: Pasta Arrabiata
instructions: Sauté garlic and chili flakes in oil until garlic is golden.
Add tomatoes, season, simmer 15 minutes.
Cook pasta until al dente.
Toss pasta with sauce, adding pasta water if needed.
Finish with fresh basil.
Serve with Parmesan.

121.name: Chicken Biryani Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Spread half the rice in baking dish.
Layer chicken pieces over rice.
Cover with remaining rice.
Drizzle saffron milk, add fried onions and mint.
Cover tightly with foil.
Bake 30 minutes and serve.

122.name: Chicken Saag
instructions: Boil mustard greens and spinach until soft, blend.
In ghee, fry onion golden, add ginger-garlic paste.
Add chicken, cook until sealed.
Add tomatoes and spices.
Mix in blended greens, cook 25 minutes.
Serve with white butter and makkai roti.

123.name: Bun Kabab
instructions: Fry flat kebab patties on tawa.
Fry a beaten egg on same tawa until set.
Place egg on kebab patty.
Toast bun on tawa.
Layer: bun, chutney, lettuce, kebab+egg, onion rings.
Apply tamarind chutney on top bun.
Serve immediately.

124.name: Roti (Whole Wheat)
instructions: Mix flour and salt, gradually add water kneading to soft smooth dough.
Add oil, knead 5 more minutes.
Rest covered 20 minutes.
Divide into balls, roll very thin.
Cook on hot tawa until bubbles form, flip.
Apply light pressure with cloth, brown spots should appear.
Brush with ghee.

125.name: Fruit Salad
instructions: Prepare all fruits and combine in large bowl.
Whisk orange juice and honey.
Pour dressing over fruit.
Toss gently.
Refrigerate 30 minutes.
Garnish with fresh mint and serve.

126.name: Chicken Nuggets
ingredients: Batter: 1 cup flour, 1 egg, 1 cup breadcrumbs, salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika
instructions: Cut chicken into nugget-sized pieces.
Coat in flour, then beaten egg, then seasoned breadcrumbs.
Press breadcrumbs firmly to adhere.
Deep fry at 175°C for 4-5 minutes until golden.
Drain on paper towel.
Serve with dipping sauces.

127.name: Dahi Bade
instructions: Soak daal overnight, grind to thick fluffy batter.
Beat batter well until light.
Fry tablespoons of batter in oil until golden.
Soak in warm water 20 minutes, squeeze out.
Arrange in dish, cover with whisked yogurt.
Top with chutneys and spices.

128.name: Stuffed Mushrooms
instructions: Remove mushroom stems, chop finely.
Sauté garlic and chopped stems, cool.
Mix with cream cheese, Parmesan, herbs, and season.
Fill each mushroom cap generously.
Top with breadcrumbs, drizzle with oil.
Bake at 190°C for 20 minutes until golden.

129.name: Mango Shrikhand
instructions: Hang yogurt in muslin cloth 4+ hours to remove all whey.
Mix hung curd with mango puree.
Add sugar and cardamom, mix well.
Add saffron dissolved in 1 tbsp warm milk.
Refrigerate 2 hours.
Serve chilled with pistachios.

130.name: Onion Bhajia
instructions: Mix gram flour with all spices and herbs.
Add sliced onions to flour mixture.
Add enough water to coat onions — thick batter.
Mix well so all onions are coated.
Drop tablespoons into hot oil.
Fry on medium until golden and crispy.
Serve hot with chutney.

131.name: Mango Margarita
ingredients: Lime slice and mango chunk for garnish
instructions: Rim glass with salt and lime juice.
Add mango puree, tequila, triple sec, and lime juice to blender.
Add ice and blend until smooth.
Pour into rimmed glass.
Garnish with lime slice and mango.

132.name: Beef Shorba
instructions: Add beef, onion, ginger-garlic paste, and spices to pot.
Add water, bring to boil.
Skim foam, reduce heat.
Simmer covered for 1.5-2 hours until meat is tender.
Adjust seasoning.
Serve hot garnished with fresh coriander and lemon.

133.name: Madeleine
instructions: Melt butter, cool slightly.
Whisk eggs and sugar until pale and thick.
Fold in vanilla and lemon zest.
Sift in flour and baking powder, fold gently.
Fold in melted butter.
Refrigerate batter 1 hour.
Fill buttered madeleine molds, bake at 200°C for 10 minutes.
Dust with icing sugar.

134.name: Chicken Spaghetti
instructions: Cook spaghetti al dente, reserve pasta water.
Sauté garlic and mushrooms in oil.
Add chicken, cook through.
Pour cream and broth, simmer 5 minutes.
Add spinach, let wilt.
Toss with pasta and Parmesan.
Adjust with pasta water for consistency.

135.name: Imli Ki Chutney
instructions: Soak tamarind and dates in 2 cups warm water for 30 minutes.
Blend together, strain through sieve.
Cook strained liquid with sugar on medium heat.
Add spices and salt.
Cook until syrupy consistency.
Cool and store in jar — lasts 2 weeks refrigerated.

136.name: Beef Stir Fry
instructions: Marinate beef in soy sauce and cornflour for 15 minutes.
Heat wok until very hot, fry beef in batches.
Set beef aside.
Stir fry garlic and ginger, add vegetables.
Return beef, add sauces.
Toss everything together on high heat.
Drizzle sesame oil, serve with rice.

137.name: Seviyan (Sweet Vermicelli)
instructions: Break vermicelli, roast in ghee until golden.
Heat milk and bring to boil.
Add roasted vermicelli to milk.
Add sugar, cardamom, raisins, and nuts.
Simmer 15 minutes until creamy.
Add rose water.
Serve warm or chilled.

138.name: Corn on the Cob
instructions: Grill corn on BBQ or gas flame, turning regularly.
Cook until charred on all sides.
Mix butter with chili powder.
Rub hot corn with spiced butter.
Squeeze lemon juice over.
Sprinkle chaat masala and serve immediately.

139.name: Beef Meatballs in Tomato Sauce
ingredients: For sauce: canned tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil
instructions: Mix beef, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, and Parmesan. Form balls.
Brown meatballs in olive oil all sides.
Remove, sauté garlic for sauce.
Add tomatoes, simmer 10 minutes.
Return meatballs, cook 20 minutes.
Top with mozzarella, melt under broiler.
Garnish with basil.

140.name: Protein Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to blender.
Blend on high until completely smooth.
Add more milk if too thick.
Pour into large glass.
Consume within 30 minutes for best nutrition.

141.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab
instructions: Squeeze excess moisture from onion in cloth.
Mix all ingredients and knead 5 minutes.
Refrigerate 1 hour.
Shape onto flat metal skewers.
Grill on BBQ 10-12 minutes, turning.
Serve with mint raita and naan.

142.name: Vegetarian Chili
ingredients: Sour cream and cheddar to serve
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic, and peppers until soft.
Add spices, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes and both beans.
Bring to simmer, cook 25 minutes.
Mash some beans for thicker texture.
Serve with sour cream, cheese, and corn chips.

143.name: Pista Kulfi
instructions: Dissolve cornflour in 1/4 cup cold milk.
Boil remaining milk, add cornflour.
Reduce to half stirring regularly — 30-40 minutes.
Add sugar, pistachio paste, cardamom, and saffron.
Cook 5 more minutes, cool.
Pour into kulfi molds, freeze overnight.
Unmold and serve garnished with pistachios.

144.name: Beef Lassi
instructions: Blend yogurt, water, sugar, and cardamom until frothy.
Add ice cubes and blend briefly.
Pour into glasses.
Top with malai.
Drizzle rose water.
Serve immediately.

145.name: Lemon Herb Quinoa
instructions: Cook quinoa in vegetable stock, drain and cool.
Mix olive oil, lemon juice, zest, and garlic.
Chop all herbs finely.
Toss quinoa with dressing and herbs.
Season with salt and pepper.
Scatter pine nuts over and serve.

146.name: Bhindi Masala
instructions: Wash and completely dry okra before slicing.
Shallow fry okra until slightly crisp, drain.
In same oil, fry cumin seeds, onions until golden.
Add tomatoes and all spices, cook 8 minutes.
Add fried okra, toss gently.
Cook uncovered 5 minutes.
Sprinkle amchur, serve with roti.

147.name: Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Cook linguine al dente, reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Sauté garlic in butter, add chili flakes.
Add shrimp, cook until pink — 2 minutes per side.
Pour wine and lemon juice, simmer 2 minutes.
Toss with pasta and pasta water.
Garnish with parsley and Parmesan.

148.name: Chatni Dahi
instructions: Blend coriander, green chilies, garlic, lemon juice, and cumin.
Add a bit of water if needed for blending.
Mix green chutney into yogurt.
Season with salt.
Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve alongside snacks and kebabs.

149.name: Tandoori Naan Pizza
ingredients: Choice of toppings: chicken tikka, bell peppers, onions, olives
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Place naans on baking sheet.
Spread tomato sauce on each.
Add mozzarella and toppings.
Bake 8-10 minutes until cheese bubbles.
Sprinkle oregano and chili flakes.

150.name: Coconut Ladoo
instructions: Dry roast coconut in pan until lightly golden.
Add condensed milk, stir continuously.
Add cardamom and saffron.
Cook on low heat until mixture leaves sides of pan.
Cool 15 minutes until handleable.
Roll into smooth balls.
Garnish with pistachios, refrigerate.

151.name: Beef Burrito
instructions: Cook beef with Mexican spices until done.
Warm tortillas to make pliable.
Layer beans, rice, beef, cheese, sour cream, and salsa in center.
Fold sides in, roll tightly into burrito.
Optional: grill seam-side down for crispy exterior.
Serve with extra salsa and guacamole.

152.name: Khoya Barfi
instructions: Heat khoya in non-stick pan on medium.
Add sugar, stir continuously.
Cook until mixture thickens and leaves sides — 20 minutes.
Add cardamom and saffron milk.
Pour into greased tray, spread evenly.
Cool, cut into squares.
Decorate with silver leaf and nuts.

153.name: Achari Aloo
instructions: Cube boiled potatoes.
Heat mustard oil, temper whole spice seeds.
Add tomatoes, cook until soft.
Add spices and potatoes.
Toss to coat all potatoes.
Cook 10 minutes on medium.
Sprinkle amchur and serve with paratha.

154.name: Garlic Bread
instructions: Mix butter with garlic, parsley, and salt.
Slice baguette at angle without cutting through.
Spread garlic butter generously between slices.
Wrap in foil, bake at 200°C for 15 minutes.
Unwrap, top with mozzarella.
Bake 5 more minutes until cheese melts.

155.name: Methi Gosht
instructions: Fry onion in oil until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and mutton, cook until sealed.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until oil separates.
Add water, pressure cook 25 minutes.
Add washed fenugreek leaves, cook uncovered 10 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

156.name: Oatmeal with Berries
instructions: Bring milk to simmer in saucepan.
Add oats and salt, stir.
Cook 5 minutes on medium, stirring occasionally.
Pour into bowl, drizzle honey.
Top with fresh berries, banana, and almond butter.
Sprinkle cinnamon and serve hot.

157.name: Chicken Souvlaki
ingredients: Marinade: olive oil, lemon, garlic, oregano, paprika
instructions: Cut chicken into chunks, marinate 1+ hours.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill on high 10-12 minutes, turning.
Warm pita on grill.
Fill pita with chicken, salad, and tzatziki.
Serve with lemon.

158.name: Qeema Naan
ingredients: Filling: 300g minced beef, onion, green chilies, coriander, spices
instructions: Prepare spiced minced beef filling, cook through and cool.
Divide dough into balls.
Flatten dough, place filling in center, seal edges.
Roll into teardrop shape carefully.
Cook on very hot tawa until charred bubbles appear.
Brush with butter, serve hot.

159.name: Matcha Latte
ingredients: 1 cup steamed oat or whole milk
instructions: Sift matcha powder to remove lumps.
Whisk with hot water to smooth paste.
Steam milk until frothy.
Pour milk over matcha paste.
Sweeten to taste.
Serve hot or iced.

160.name: Lobster Bisque
instructions: Shell lobster, sauté shells in butter, remove.
Sauté vegetables in same pot.
Add tomato paste, cook 2 minutes.
Add wine, reduce by half.
Add stock and shells, simmer 20 minutes.
Strain, add cream and lobster meat diced.
Cook 5 minutes, serve.

161.name: Aloo Tikki
instructions: Mash potatoes finely.
Mix with peas, spices, and herbs.
Shape into flat round patties.
Coat in breadcrumbs.
Shallow fry in hot oil until golden on both sides.
Serve with chutneys and yogurt.

162.name: Beef Keema Puff
instructions: Prepare spiced beef filling and cool completely.
Roll out puff pastry, cut into rectangles.
Place filling on one half, fold over.
Press edges firmly with fork to seal.
Brush with egg wash, sprinkle sesame seeds.
Bake at 200°C for 20 minutes until golden.

163.name: Honey Garlic Chicken
instructions: Mix honey, garlic, soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil.
Brown chicken skin-side down in oven-proof pan.
Flip, pour sauce over.
Transfer to oven at 200°C for 25 minutes.
Baste halfway through.
Garnish with spring onions and sesame seeds.

164.name: Paye Shorba
instructions: Clean trotters thoroughly.
Add all to pressure cooker with water.
Cook under pressure 2+ hours until very soft.
Open, adjust seasoning.
Simmer uncovered 20 minutes until broth is slightly thick.
Serve with ginger, coriander, and naan.

165.name: Raspberry Mousse
instructions: Blend and strain raspberries through sieve.
Bloom gelatin, dissolve in warm raspberry puree.
Whip cream to soft peaks.
Whisk whites with sugar to stiff peaks.
Fold cream into raspberry mixture.
Fold in egg whites gently.
Pour into glasses, refrigerate 4 hours.

166.name: Sago Pudding
instructions: Soak sago in water 30 minutes.
Bring coconut milk and whole milk to simmer.
Add drained sago, stir frequently.
Cook 20 minutes until sago is translucent.
Add sugar and cardamom.
Cool slightly, serve with fresh fruit.

167.name: Roasted Vegetables
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Chop all vegetables into similar-sized chunks.
Toss with olive oil, garlic, and herbs.
Spread in single layer on baking sheet.
Roast 30-35 minutes until charred at edges.
Season and serve as side dish.

168.name: Chicken Sholay
ingredients: Marinade: yogurt, sholay masala, ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice
instructions: Marinate chicken 2 hours in spiced yogurt.
Fry marinated chicken on tawa until cooked.
Separately deep fry potatoes into crispy fries.
Serve chicken over fries.
Top with fried egg, ketchup, and chaat masala.

169.name: Poached Pears
instructions: Combine wine/water with sugar and spices, bring to boil.
Dissolve sugar completely.
Add peeled pears, liquid should almost cover.
Simmer gently 20-25 minutes until tender.
Cool pears in liquid.
Reduce liquid by half for syrup.
Serve pears with syrup and mascarpone.

170.name: Grilled Corn Salad
instructions: Grill corn until charred all sides, cool and cut off kernels.
Combine corn with tomatoes, onion, and avocado.
Dress with lime juice, cumin, and olive oil.
Toss with cilantro.
Crumble feta on top.
Serve at room temperature.

171.name: Masala Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs well.
Mix in all vegetables and spices.
Heat oil in pan until very hot.
Pour egg mixture in.
Let set on bottom, flip carefully.
Cook until set throughout.
Serve with ketchup and bread.

172.name: Jalebi
ingredients: Sugar syrup: 2 cups sugar, 1 cup water, saffron, cardamom
instructions: Make thin batter from flour, yogurt, and water, rest 30 minutes.
Prepare thick sugar syrup with saffron.
Fill piping bag or squeeze bottle with batter.
Pipe spiral/pretzel shapes into hot oil.
Fry until crisp.
Immediately transfer to warm sugar syrup for 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

173.name: Beef Seekh Paratha Roll
instructions: Cook paratha on tawa.
Fry egg on same tawa.
Place egg on paratha.
Add seekh kebab.
Apply both chutneys.
Add onions and coriander.
Squeeze lemon, roll tightly in foil.

174.name: Cold Brew Coffee
instructions: Combine coffee and cold water in jar.
Stir, cover, and refrigerate 12-24 hours.
Strain through fine sieve or cheesecloth.
Store concentrated cold brew in fridge.
To serve, pour over ice with equal parts water or milk.
Sweeten if desired.

175.name: Chicken Zinger
ingredients: Spiced flour coating: flour, cayenne, black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, salt
instructions: Marinate chicken in spiced buttermilk 4 hours minimum.
Coat thoroughly in spiced flour.
Double coat: dip back in buttermilk then flour again.
Deep fry at 170°C for 8-10 minutes.
Rest on rack.
Assemble on toasted bun with coleslaw and jalapeños.

176.name: Qorma Pulao
instructions: Cook mutton qorma until tender.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer rice over qorma in large pot.
Add saffron milk and fried onions.
Seal and cook dum 20 minutes.
Mix and serve with raita.

177.name: Ramen
instructions: Heat broth, whisk in miso paste, soy sauce.
Cook noodles per packet.
Soft boil eggs 6.5 minutes, peel.
Slice cooked protein.
Assemble: noodles + hot broth + protein + toppings.
Drizzle sesame oil.

178.name: Chicken Saag Paratha
ingredients: Paratha dough: 2 cups atta, water, salt
instructions: Make soft dough, rest 20 minutes.
Roll small ball flat.
Add chicken saag filling in center.
Fold dough over filling, seal.
Roll gently into flat paratha.
Cook on hot tawa with butter until golden.
Serve with yogurt.

179.name: Vanilla Panna Cotta
ingredients: 1 vanilla pod or 2 tsp vanilla extract
instructions: Bloom gelatin in cold milk for 5 minutes.
Heat cream, sugar, and vanilla until steaming.
Add gelatin mixture, stir to dissolve.
Strain into glasses or molds.
Refrigerate 4+ hours until set.
Serve with berry coulis.

180.name: Chili Garlic Noodles
instructions: Cook noodles per packet, drain.
Fry garlic in oil until golden.
Add chili sauce, soy sauce, and vinegar.
Toss noodles in sauce until coated.
Drizzle sesame oil.
Top with spring onions, sesame seeds, and fried egg.

181.name: Lamb Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in wok, add lamb and ginger-garlic paste.
Cook on high 15 minutes until sealed.
Add tomatoes, cook until very soft.
Season with spices.
Cook uncovered until oil separates.
Garnish with ginger, chilies, and coriander.

182.name: Sourdough Toast with Avocado
instructions: Toast sourdough until golden and crispy.
Mash avocado with lemon zest and sea salt.
Spread on toast.
Top with cherry tomatoes and feta.
Drizzle olive oil.
Finish with red pepper flakes.

183.name: Mango Cheesecake
ingredients: Filling: 500g cream cheese, 100g sugar, 300ml cream, 1 tsp vanilla
Topping: 2 cups mango puree, 2 tsp gelatin
instructions: Press biscuit base into springform pan, chill.
Beat cream cheese and sugar smooth.
Whip cream, fold into cream cheese.
Pour over base, chill 4 hours.
Bloom gelatin in mango puree, warm to dissolve, cool.
Pour mango layer over set cheesecake.
Refrigerate 2 more hours.

184.name: Lamb Pulao
instructions: Cook lamb in water with spices and onions until very tender.
Reserve lamb broth.
Soak rice 30 minutes.
Fry onions and whole spices in ghee.
Add rice, stir 3 minutes.
Add hot lamb broth, bring to boil.
Add lamb pieces on top, seal and cook 20 minutes.

185.name: Sindhi Biryani
instructions: Cook chicken with tomatoes, potatoes, plums, and masala.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer chicken masala, rice, mint, saffron milk.
Repeat layers, top with fried onions.
Seal and cook dum 30 minutes.
Serve hot.

186.name: Espresso Martini
instructions: Brew espresso and cool completely.
Add vodka, coffee liqueur, and espresso to cocktail shaker.
Fill with ice.
Shake vigorously for 30 seconds.
Strain into chilled martini glass.
Garnish with 3 coffee beans.

187.name: Dal Fry
ingredients: Tadka: ghee, garlic, dried red chili, cumin
instructions: Pressure cook dal with turmeric until soft.
In pan, fry cumin seeds, onion until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and tomatoes, cook down.
Combine with dal, simmer 15 minutes.
Make tadka: heat ghee, fry garlic, dried chili, and cumin.
Pour tadka over dal.
Serve with roti.

188.name: Shakarpara with Sesame
instructions: Toast sesame seeds in dry pan.
Mix flour, sugar, sesame, cardamom, and ghee.
Add enough milk for stiff dough.
Roll to 1cm, cut into shapes.
Deep fry on medium until golden.
Cool completely and store.

189.name: Honey Lime Dressing
instructions: Whisk lime juice, honey, and mustard together.
Slowly drizzle in olive oil, whisking constantly.
Add garlic and season.
Stir in cilantro.
Store in jar, keeps 1 week refrigerated.
Use on salads, grilled meats, or rice bowls.

190.name: Pulled Pork
ingredients: Dry rub: paprika, garlic, brown sugar, cumin, salt, pepper
instructions: Coat pork with dry rub, marinate overnight.
Slow cook in oven at 150°C for 6-8 hours.
Rest 30 minutes.
Pull apart with two forks.
Toss with BBQ sauce.
Serve in buns with coleslaw.

191.name: Crispy Okra
instructions: Slice okra very thin (rings).
Sprinkle gram flour and all spices over okra.
Toss to coat evenly.
Deep fry in batches in hot oil until very crispy.
Drain on paper towel.
Serve immediately as snack or side.

192.name: Cannoli
ingredients: Shells: 200g flour, 30g sugar, 1 egg, 30g butter, white wine, oil for frying
Filling: 500g ricotta, 150g icing sugar, chocolate chips, orange zest, vanilla
instructions: Make dough, rest 30 minutes.
Roll thin, cut circles, wrap around cannoli forms.
Fry until golden, cool, remove forms.
Beat ricotta with icing sugar until smooth.
Add chocolate chips and orange zest.
Pipe into shells just before serving.
Dust with icing sugar.

193.name: Reshmi Kebab
instructions: Mix all ingredients into smooth paste.
Refrigerate 2 hours.
Shape around flat skewers.
Cook in moderately hot oven 180°C for 20 minutes.
Baste with cream midway.
Serve with mint chutney.

194.name: Cucumber Raita
instructions: Grate cucumber, squeeze out excess water.
Whisk yogurt until smooth.
Mix in cucumber.
Season with cumin, chili, and salt.
Garnish with mint or coriander.
Serve cold with biryani or pulao.

195.name: Tom Kha Soup
instructions: Simmer broth with lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves 10 minutes.
Add coconut milk, bring to gentle simmer.
Add chicken, cook until done.
Add mushrooms, cook 3 minutes.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice.
Garnish with cilantro.

196.name: Ginger Tea
instructions: Boil water with grated ginger and cardamom for 5 minutes.
Add tea leaves, brew 3 minutes.
Add milk, boil once.
Reduce heat, simmer 2 minutes.
Strain and pour into cups.
Add sugar to taste.

197.name: Spicy Tuna Sushi Bowl
instructions: Mix diced tuna with sriracha and mayo.
Layer sushi rice in bowl.
Arrange tuna, avocado, cucumber, and edamame.
Drizzle soy sauce.
Sprinkle sesame seeds.
Add nori strips and serve.

198.name: Chicken Boti
instructions: Marinate chicken cubes in yogurt, masala, ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice for 3+ hours.
Thread on skewers.
Grill on high heat or BBQ for 12-15 minutes.
Sprinkle chaat masala.
Serve with mint chutney, onions, and naan.

199.name: Vegetable Pakora
instructions: Make thick batter from gram flour, spices, and water.
Mix all vegetables into batter.
Heat oil to medium high.
Drop spoonfuls of batter-coated vegetables.
Fry until golden crisp.
Serve hot with chutney.

200.name: Crepes
ingredients: Nutella, fruit, or whipped cream for filling
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth batter.
Rest 30 minutes.
Heat non-stick pan with butter.
Pour thin layer of batter, swirl to coat.
Cook 1 minute, flip, cook 30 seconds.
Fill with desired fillings.
Fold or roll and serve.

201.name: Murgh Pulao
ingredients: Whole spices: cinnamon, cardamom, bay leaves
instructions: Cook chicken in water with onions and whole spices until tender.
Reserve rich chicken broth.
Fry onions in ghee, add drained chicken.
Brown lightly, add soaked rice.
Pour hot broth, bring to boil.
Cover and cook 20 minutes.
Rest and serve.

202.name: Mango Sorbet
instructions: Make simple syrup with sugar and water, cool.
Peel and blend mangoes until smooth.
Mix mango puree with syrup and lime juice.
Pour into freezer container.
Freeze 2 hours, blend again.
Freeze 4 more hours until firm.
Scoop and serve with mint.

203.name: Pistachio Cake
ingredients: Pistachio frosting: cream cheese, icing sugar, pistachio paste
instructions: Blend pistachios to fine meal.
Cream butter and sugar, add eggs.
Fold in pistachio meal, flour, and baking powder.
Add rose water.
Bake at 170°C for 35-40 minutes.
Cool completely, frost with pistachio cream cheese.
Garnish with crushed pistachios.

204.name: Doodh Soda
instructions: Pour cold milk into glass with ice.
Add Rooh Afza and lemon juice.
Gently pour sparkling water on top.
Add pinch of salt.
Stir gently and serve immediately.

205.name: Chicken Stew
instructions: Season chicken and brown in oil.
Remove, sauté vegetables.
Add flour, cook 2 minutes.
Add broth and herbs, bring to boil.
Return chicken, simmer covered 40 minutes.
Check seasoning.
Serve with crusty bread.

206.name: Barfi
instructions: Mix milk powder and condensed milk in non-stick pan.
Add ghee, cook on medium heat stirring.
Cook until mixture forms a soft dough consistency.
Add cardamom and rose water.
Pour into greased tray.
Press flat, cool, cut into squares.
Decorate with silver leaf and pistachios.

207.name: Shakshuka Green
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add spinach in batches, wilt down.
Add spices and beans, cook 5 minutes.
Make wells, crack eggs in.
Cover, cook 8 minutes until whites set.
Crumble feta, garnish with dill.

208.name: Nihari Gosht
instructions: Heat ghee, cook ginger-garlic paste and nihari masala 3 minutes.
Add beef shank, fry 10 minutes.
Add 6 cups hot water, simmer 3-4 hours.
Mix flour with water, add to thicken.
Simmer 30 more minutes.
Garnish lavishly with ginger, chilies, fried onions, coriander.

209.name: Peach Cobbler
instructions: Melt butter in baking dish in oven at 180°C.
Mix flour, 3/4 cup sugar, baking powder, milk — pour over butter.
Mix peaches with remaining sugar and cinnamon.
Spoon over batter — do not mix.
Bake 45 minutes until golden.
Serve warm with ice cream.

210.name: Aloo Methi
instructions: Blanch fenugreek leaves briefly to reduce bitterness.
Fry potatoes until slightly golden, drain.
In oil, temper cumin, add onion until golden.
Add spices, then potatoes.
Add fenugreek leaves, mix.
Cook covered 15 minutes.
Serve with roti.

211.name: Lassi (Salty)
instructions: Blend yogurt and water until smooth and frothy.
Add cumin powder and black salt.
Blend briefly.
Pour over ice cubes.
Garnish with fresh mint and pinch of cumin.
Serve immediately.

212.name: Roast Vegetables with Couscous
instructions: Roast vegetables at 200°C for 30 minutes.
Pour hot stock over couscous, cover 5 minutes, fluff.
Mix couscous with lemon juice and olive oil.
Top with roasted vegetables.
Garnish with fresh parsley.

213.name: Aloo Gosht
instructions: Heat oil, fry onions until golden.
Add mutton and brown well.
Add spices and tomatoes, cook until oil separates.
Add water and cook mutton 70% done.
Add potatoes and cook until both are tender.
Garnish with coriander and serve.

214.name: Chana Dal
instructions: Soak chana dal for 1 hour, then boil until soft.
Heat oil, fry cumin then onions until golden.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until thick.
Add boiled dal, simmer 15 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and serve with rice.

215.name: Tarka Dal
instructions: Boil lentils with turmeric until mushy.
Heat oil, fry cumin seeds until crackling.
Add onion and garlic, fry until golden.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until thick.
Pour tarka over lentils, simmer 5 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and serve.

216.name: Chicken Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in karahi, add ginger garlic paste.
Add chicken and sear until white.
Add tomatoes and cook until pulpy.
Add spices and cook on high heat.
Simmer until chicken is fully cooked.
Garnish with coriander, ginger and green chilies.

217.name: Mango Lassi
instructions: Blend mango pulp until smooth.
Add yogurt, milk and sugar, blend again.
Add cardamom and saffron.
Blend with ice until frothy.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

218.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
instructions: Brown lamb pieces in hot oil.
Add onions and cook until caramelized.
Mix spices with yogurt and add to lamb.
Cook on medium heat stirring frequently.
Add water and simmer until lamb is tender.
Serve with rice or naan.

219.name: Greek Moussaka
instructions: Fry eggplant slices in olive oil until golden.
Cook beef with onions, tomatoes and spices.
Layer eggplant and meat sauce in baking dish.
Pour béchamel sauce on top.
Sprinkle parmesan and bake at 180°C for 45 minutes.
Cool slightly before serving.

220.name: Pad Thai
instructions: Soak noodles in warm water until soft.
Stir fry shrimp in hot wok until pink.
Push aside, scramble eggs in same wok.
Add noodles, fish sauce, tamarind and sugar.
Add bean sprouts and spring onions.
Serve topped with peanuts and lime.

221.name: Beef Stroganoff
instructions: Brown beef strips in butter, set aside.
Sauté onion and mushrooms until soft.
Sprinkle flour, stir and add broth.
Return beef and simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in sour cream and mustard.
Serve over cooked egg noodles.

222.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter together.
Whisk eggs, yolks and sugar until pale.
Fold in chocolate mixture, then flour.
Pour into greased ramekins.
Bake at 200°C for 12 minutes.
Invert onto plates, serve with ice cream.

223.name: Mutton Paya
instructions: Clean trotters thoroughly.
Boil trotters in salted water for 2 hours.
Heat oil, fry onions until golden.
Add ginger garlic paste and spices.
Add trotters with their stock.
Simmer 30 minutes until thick, garnish and serve.

224.name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread until crispy.
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Spread mashed avocado on toast.
Top with poached or fried eggs.
Add cherry tomatoes and microgreens.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes and drizzle olive oil.

225.name: Chicken Shawarma
instructions: Marinate chicken with spices and yogurt for 2 hours.
Grill or bake chicken until cooked through.
Slice chicken thinly.
Warm pita bread.
Spread garlic and tahini sauce on pita.
Add chicken, vegetables and roll tightly.

226.name: Palak Chicken
instructions: Blanch spinach and blend to puree.
Heat oil, fry onions until golden.
Add ginger garlic paste and chicken.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until done.
Add spinach puree and simmer 15 minutes.
Serve with naan or rice.

227.name: Smoothie Bowl
ingredients: Toppings: granola, fresh fruit, chia seeds, coconut flakes, honey
instructions: Blend frozen banana and berries with almond milk.
Blend until thick and creamy.
Pour into a bowl.
Arrange toppings decoratively.
Serve immediately.

228.name: Malai Boti
instructions: Cut chicken into cubes.
Mix cream, yogurt, ginger garlic paste and spices.
Marinate chicken for 4 hours.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill until golden with char marks.
Serve with mint chutney and naan.

229.name: Tiramisu
instructions: Beat egg yolks with sugar until pale.
Fold in mascarpone until smooth.
Whip egg whites to stiff peaks, fold in.
Dip ladyfingers in coffee and coffee liqueur.
Layer in dish: biscuits then cream.
Repeat layers, dust with cocoa and refrigerate 4 hours.

230.name: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Heat wok until very hot, add oil.
Scramble eggs and set aside.
Stir fry garlic, then add vegetables.
Add rice and toss well on high heat.
Add soy sauce, sesame oil, eggs.
Toss everything together, add spring onions and serve.

231.name: Butternut Squash Soup
instructions: Roast squash at 200°C for 40 minutes.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add ginger and cumin, cook 1 minute.
Scoop squash flesh and add to pot with broth.
Simmer 15 minutes, then blend until smooth.
Stir in coconut milk, season and serve with pumpkin seeds.

232.name: Chicken Fajitas
instructions: Season chicken with fajita spice and lime juice.
Grill chicken until cooked, slice.
Stir fry peppers and onion until slightly charred.
Warm tortillas on skillet.
Fill with chicken and peppers.
Serve with sour cream, guacamole and salsa.

233.name: Macaroni Cheese
instructions: Cook macaroni until al dente.
Make béchamel with butter, flour and milk.
Melt cheeses into béchamel, add mustard.
Mix with macaroni.
Transfer to baking dish, top with breadcrumbs.
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes until golden.

234.name: Zarda Rice
instructions: Boil rice until 80% done, drain.
Dissolve saffron in warm milk.
Heat ghee, fry nuts and raisins.
Mix sugar with rice, add ghee and saffron.
Steam on low heat for 20 minutes.
Garnish with nuts, khoya and serve.

235.name: Prawn Tempura
instructions: Clean prawns, leaving tails on.
Mix flour, egg and cold water lightly (don't overmix).
Dip prawns in batter.
Deep fry in hot oil for 2-3 minutes until crispy.
Drain on paper towels.
Serve immediately with dipping sauce.

236.name: Chicken Caesar Salad
ingredients: Caesar dressing: mayo, anchovies, garlic, lemon, parmesan, Worcestershire sauce
instructions: Grill chicken breasts, slice when cool.
Make dressing by blending all dressing ingredients.
Tear lettuce into pieces.
Toss lettuce with dressing.
Top with chicken, parmesan and croutons.
Serve immediately.

237.name: Chilli Chicken
instructions: Coat chicken in cornflour and egg, deep fry.
In wok, stir fry onion and capsicum.
Add green chilies, soy sauce, chili sauce and vinegar.
Add fried chicken and toss well.
Cook on high heat 3 minutes.
Serve hot garnished with spring onions.

238.name: Kheer
instructions: Boil milk in heavy pot, add washed rice.
Cook on low heat stirring frequently.
Once rice is fully cooked and milk thickened, add sugar.
Add cardamom and saffron dissolved in milk.
Add rose water and nuts.
Serve hot or chilled.

239.name: Spinach and Feta Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in non-stick pan.
Pour in eggs, cook on medium heat.
Add spinach and feta on one half.
Fold omelette over filling.
Slide onto plate, serve with tomatoes.

240.name: Beef Bulgogi
instructions: Mix soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, pear, garlic and ginger.
Marinate beef for at least 1 hour.
Grill or pan fry beef on high heat.
Cook until caramelized and cooked through.
Garnish with sesame seeds and spring onions.
Serve over rice.

241.name: Aloo Paratha
instructions: Make soft dough with flour and water, rest 30 minutes.
Mash potatoes with onion, chilies, spices and coriander.
Divide dough into balls, stuff with potato filling.
Roll into flat parathas.
Fry on hot griddle with ghee on both sides.
Serve with yogurt and pickle.

242.name: Pesto Pasta
ingredients: For pesto: 2 cups basil leaves, 50g pine nuts, 2 garlic cloves, 100ml olive oil, 50g parmesan
instructions: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, parmesan and olive oil.
Cook pasta until al dente, reserve pasta water.
Toss hot pasta with pesto.
Add pasta water to loosen if needed.
Add halved cherry tomatoes.
Serve with extra parmesan.

243.name: Gol Gappay
ingredients: For pani: mint, coriander, green chilies, cumin, tamarind, black salt, water
instructions: Blend all pani ingredients, strain and chill.
Mix chickpeas and potatoes together.
Make a hole in each puri.
Fill with chickpea mixture.
Add a little imli chutney.
Dip in cold pani and serve immediately.

244.name: Chicken Qorma
instructions: Blend fried onions to paste.
Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Heat oil, add ginger garlic and onion paste.
Add chicken and cook until sealed.
Add almond paste, cream and garam masala.
Simmer on low heat until thick and rich, serve.

245.name: Lemon Cheesecake
instructions: Mix biscuits and butter, press into springform tin.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well.
Add lemon zest, juice and vanilla.
Pour over base, bake at 160°C for 45 minutes.
Cool and refrigerate overnight before serving.

246.name: Masoor Dal
instructions: Boil lentils until tender.
Heat oil, fry cumin and then onion until golden.
Add garlic, tomatoes and spices, cook until thick.
Add boiled lentils and simmer.
Garnish with coriander and drizzle of oil.
Serve with chapati.

247.name: Fish Tacos
instructions: Season fish with cumin, paprika and garlic powder.
Pan fry or grill fish until flaky.
Warm tortillas.
Flake fish into pieces.
Assemble tacos: fish, coleslaw, avocado.
Top with sour cream, salsa, cilantro and lime.

248.name: Chai Latte
ingredients: 2 chai tea bags or 2 tsp loose tea
instructions: Simmer water with cardamom, cinnamon, cloves and ginger.
Add tea bags and steep 5 minutes.
Add milk and sugar, heat but do not boil.
Froth if desired.
Strain into cups.
Serve hot or over ice.

249.name: Chicken Korma
instructions: Blend fried onions into a fine paste.
Heat oil with whole spices.
Add ginger garlic paste and onion paste.
Add chicken, yogurt and almond paste.
Cook on low heat stirring until oil separates.
Add saffron milk, simmer until rich.

250.name: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Heat wok on very high heat, add oil.
Stir fry garlic and ginger 30 seconds.
Add hardest vegetables first (carrots, broccoli).
Add remaining vegetables and toss constantly.
Pour in soy and oyster sauce.
Finish with sesame oil and serve over rice.

251.name: Shakshuka
instructions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil.
Add garlic and spices, cook 1 minute.
Add tomatoes, simmer 10 minutes.
Make wells in sauce, crack in eggs.
Cover and cook until eggs are set.
Top with feta and parsley, serve with bread.

252.name: Chicken Tikka Biryani
instructions: Prepare chicken tikka separately.
Cook rice 80% done with whole spices.
Layer rice with chicken tikka.
Add fried onions, mint and saffron milk.
Seal with dough and steam 20 minutes on low.
Open and mix before serving.

253.name: Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 175°C.
Mash bananas, mix with melted butter.
Add sugar, egg and vanilla.
Add baking soda and salt.
Fold in flour until just combined.
Pour into greased loaf tin, bake 60 minutes.

254.name: Watermelon Juice
instructions: Cut watermelon into chunks.
Blend until smooth.
Strain through fine mesh sieve.
Add lime juice, honey and salt.
Pour over ice.
Garnish with mint and lime slice.

255.name: Prawn Biryani
instructions: Marinate prawns with spices and yogurt.
Prepare biryani masala with onions and tomatoes.
Cook rice 80% done.
Layer rice and prawn masala.
Top with fried onions, mint and coriander.
Steam 15 minutes on low heat.

256.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
instructions: Cook fettuccine until al dente.
Melt butter in wide pan, add cream.
Simmer until slightly reduced.
Add parmesan and stir until melted.
Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg.
Toss pasta in sauce, serve immediately.

257.name: Fruit Chaat
instructions: Combine all fruits in large bowl.
Sprinkle chaat masala and black salt.
Add sugar and lemon juice.
Toss gently.
Refrigerate 15 minutes to marinate.
Garnish with mint and pomegranate seeds.

258.name: Souvlaki
instructions: Marinate meat with olive oil, lemon, garlic and herbs for 2 hours.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill over high heat, turning frequently.
Cook until charred and cooked through.
Serve in warm pita with tzatziki.
Add tomatoes and onion.

259.name: Chicken Club Sandwich
instructions: Toast all bread slices.
Grill chicken and bacon until cooked.
Spread mayo on bread slices.
Layer: bread, lettuce, chicken, tomato.
Add second bread slice, then egg, bacon.
Top with final bread slice, cut diagonally.

260.name: Quinoa Salad
ingredients: Lemon dressing: lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt
instructions: Cook quinoa in 2 cups water until fluffy.
Let cool completely.
Chop all vegetables.
Make dressing by whisking all ingredients.
Toss quinoa with vegetables.
Add feta and dressing, mix and serve.

261.name: Mutton Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in karahi, add mutton and brown well.
Add ginger garlic paste and cook.
Add tomatoes and cook until pulpy.
Add spices and cook on high heat.
Add a little water, cover and cook 45 minutes.
Garnish and serve.

262.name: Waffles with Berries
instructions: Mix dry ingredients in one bowl.
Whisk eggs, buttermilk and butter in another.
Combine wet and dry, don't overmix.
Preheat waffle iron, spray with oil.
Cook waffles until golden and crispy.
Serve topped with berries, cream and maple syrup.

263.name: Korean Bibimbap
instructions: Cook each vegetable separately with garlic and sesame oil.
Season beef with soy sauce and cook.
Arrange rice in bowl.
Place each topping in sections around bowl.
Top with fried egg.
Add gochujang and mix everything together before eating.

264.name: Gajar Ka Halwa
instructions: Cook grated carrots in milk on low heat.
Stir frequently until milk is absorbed.
Add ghee and continue cooking.
Add sugar and khoya, cook until thick.
Add cardamom and nuts.
Serve hot or warm.

265.name: Prawn Curry
instructions: Heat oil, fry onions until golden.
Add ginger garlic and tomatoes.
Add all spices and cook until oil separates.
Add prawns, cook 5-7 minutes until pink.
Add curry leaves and garam masala.
Serve with rice or naan.

266.name: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add mushrooms and cook until golden.
Add rice and toast 2 minutes.
Add wine and stir until absorbed.
Add broth ladle by ladle, stirring constantly.
Finish with butter and parmesan, season and serve.

267.name: Jaljeera
instructions: Blend mint, coriander, cumin, tamarind and lemon juice.
Add water and blend again.
Strain through fine sieve.
Add black salt and chaat masala.
Adjust seasoning.
Serve over ice with lime garnish.

268.name: Chicken Manchurian
ingredients: For sauce: soy sauce, chili sauce, garlic, ginger, spring onions, cornflour
instructions: Coat chicken in cornflour and egg, deep fry.
In wok, sauté garlic and ginger.
Add sauces and a little water.
Thicken with cornflour slurry.
Add fried chicken and toss.
Garnish with spring onions and serve.

269.name: Tabbouleh
instructions: Pour boiling water over bulgur, let sit 20 minutes.
Drain and fluff with fork.
Chop parsley very finely.
Mix all vegetables with bulgur.
Dress with lemon juice and olive oil.
Season and refrigerate 30 minutes before serving.

270.name: Chocolate Mousse
instructions: Melt chocolate and let cool slightly.
Whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale.
Fold egg yolks into chocolate.
Whip cream to soft peaks, fold in.
Whip egg whites with salt to stiff peaks.
Fold whites gently into chocolate mixture, refrigerate 4 hours.

271.name: Daal Makhani
instructions: Soak lentils and beans overnight, boil until soft.
Fry onion in butter until golden.
Add ginger garlic paste, tomatoes and spices.
Add lentils and cook on low heat 30 minutes.
Stir in cream.
Serve with naan.

272.name: Spanakopita
instructions: Squeeze moisture from spinach.
Mix spinach with feta, eggs, herbs and spices.
Brush phyllo sheets with butter.
Layer 5 sheets in baking dish.
Add filling, top with more phyllo.
Brush top with butter, score and bake 40 minutes at 180°C.

273.name: Aloo Chaat
instructions: Fry or air fry potato cubes until crispy.
Place in bowl.
Drizzle both chutneys and yogurt.
Sprinkle all dry spices.
Add onion and coriander.
Top with sev and serve immediately.

274.name: Green Smoothie
instructions: Add spinach and coconut water to blender first.
Blend until smooth.
Add remaining fruits and honey.
Blend until completely smooth.
Add ice and blend briefly.
Pour and serve immediately.

275.name: Saag
instructions: Boil mustard greens and spinach until soft.
Blend to coarse paste.
Heat ghee, fry onion until golden.
Add ginger garlic and green chilies.
Add greens and cornmeal, cook 20 minutes.
Serve topped with butter and with corn chapati.

276.name: Blueberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C, line muffin tin.
Cream butter and sugar.
Beat in eggs and vanilla.
Alternate adding buttermilk and dry ingredients.
Fold in blueberries gently.
Fill muffin cups, sprinkle sugar, bake 20 minutes.

277.name: Tom Yum Soup
instructions: Bring broth to boil with lemongrass, galangal and lime leaves.
Add chili paste and fish sauce.
Add mushrooms and tomatoes.
Add shrimp and cook until pink.
Add lime juice, adjust seasoning.
Garnish with coriander and serve.

278.name: Chicken Pulao
ingredients: Whole spices: cumin, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, bay leaves
instructions: Heat oil, fry whole spices.
Add onions until golden, add ginger garlic.
Add chicken pieces and brown.
Add stock and bring to boil.
Add washed rice, reduce heat.
Cook covered until water absorbed, rest 10 minutes.

279.name: Baklava
ingredients: For syrup: 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup water, 2 tbsp honey, rose water
instructions: Layer phyllo sheets with butter in baking dish.
Mix nuts with cinnamon.
Add nut layer and continue layering phyllo.
Score diamond shapes on top, bake at 180°C for 40 minutes.
Make syrup, boil then cool.
Pour cool syrup over hot baklava.

280.name: Salmon Teriyaki
ingredients: For teriyaki: soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar
