instructions: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake and sugar for teriyaki.
Marinate salmon 30 minutes.
Pan sear salmon skin side down 4 minutes.
Flip and brush with teriyaki glaze.
Cook 3 more minutes until glazed.
Serve with rice and broccoli.

281.name: Dahi Bhalla
instructions: Soak dal overnight, grind to smooth batter.
Add salt, beat until fluffy.
Deep fry small balls until golden.
Soak in warm water 10 minutes, squeeze dry.
Arrange in dish, cover with yogurt.
Top with chutneys, spices and garnishes.

282.name: Roast Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Mix butter with garlic and herbs.
Push butter under chicken skin.
Stuff cavity with lemon and herbs.
Season outside with salt and pepper.
Roast 1 hour 20 minutes until golden.

283.name: Kashmiri Chai
instructions: Boil water with tea leaves and baking soda 15 minutes.
Add cardamom and cinnamon, continue boiling.
Add milk and simmer until pink color develops.
Strain into cups.
Top with sliced nuts.
Serve hot immediately.

284.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
instructions: Make tikka masala sauce by cooking onions, tomatoes and spices.
Blend sauce until smooth, return to pan.
Add cream and butter, simmer.
Add grilled chicken tikka pieces.
Simmer 15 minutes until chicken absorbs flavors.
Garnish with cream and fenugreek.

285.name: Apple Crumble
ingredients: For crumble: 150g flour, 100g butter, 75g sugar, 50g oats, 1/2 tsp cinnamon
instructions: Toss apples with sugar, cinnamon and lemon.
Place in baking dish.
Rub cold butter into flour until breadcrumbs.
Mix in sugar, oats and cinnamon.
Sprinkle crumble over apples.
Bake at 180°C for 35 minutes, serve with custard.

286.name: Mujadara
instructions: Boil lentils until nearly tender.
Add rice and continue cooking.
Caramelize onions in olive oil, very slowly for 30 minutes.
Season lentils and rice with spices.
Top with caramelized onions and oil.
Serve with yogurt.

287.name: Shami Kebab
instructions: Cook beef and dal together with onion and spices.
Blend to smooth paste when cooled.
Add egg and mix well.
Shape into round patties.
Pan fry in oil until golden on both sides.
Serve with mint chutney.

288.name: French Onion Soup
instructions: Cook onions in butter on low heat for 45 minutes until caramelized.
Add flour, then wine and cook 5 minutes.
Add broth, thyme and bay leaf, simmer 30 minutes.
Season, remove bay leaf.
Ladle into oven-safe bowls, top with baguette and cheese.
Broil until cheese is golden and bubbling.

289.name: Chicken Corn Soup
instructions: Bring broth to boil, add chicken and corn.
Mix cornflour with water, add to soup to thicken.
Stream in beaten eggs while stirring.
Add soy sauce and ginger.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve garnished with spring onions and a dash of vinegar.

290.name: Banana Foster
instructions: Melt butter in pan, add brown sugar.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Add banana halves cut side down.
Cook 2 minutes each side.
Add rum and flambe carefully.
Serve immediately over vanilla ice cream.

291.name: Chicken Samosa
ingredients: For filling: chicken mince, onion, green chilies, garam masala, coriander
For pastry: flour, oil, water, salt
instructions: Make stiff dough, rest 30 minutes.
Fry chicken mince with spices until dry.
Roll dough thin, cut into circles or squares.
Fill with chicken and fold into triangles.
Seal edges with water.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.

292.name: Overnight Oats
instructions: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, chia seeds, honey and vanilla.
Stir well until combined.
Pour into jars with lids.
Refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours.
In morning, add chosen toppings.
Eat cold or warm up in microwave.

293.name: Baingan Ka Bharta
instructions: Char eggplant directly on flame or under grill.
Peel and mash the flesh.
Heat oil, fry onions until golden.
Add ginger garlic, tomatoes and spices.
Add mashed eggplant, mix well.
Cook 10 minutes, garnish with coriander.

294.name: Churros
ingredients: Cinnamon sugar: 1 cup sugar, 2 tsp cinnamon
instructions: Boil water and butter, add flour all at once.
Stir vigorously until dough forms.
Off heat, beat in eggs one at a time.
Pipe through star nozzle into hot oil.
Fry until golden, 3-4 minutes.
Roll in cinnamon sugar and serve with chocolate sauce.

295.name: Egg Biryani
instructions: Fry boiled eggs whole until golden, set aside.
Make masala with onion, tomato and spices.
Cook rice 80% done.
Layer rice with masala and eggs.
Add fried onions, mint and saffron milk.
Steam 15 minutes on low heat.

296.name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown beef, drain fat.
Add taco seasoning and water, simmer until thickened.
Warm tortillas.
Fill with seasoned beef.
Top with lettuce, tomato and cheese.
Add sour cream, guacamole and salsa.

297.name: Labneh
instructions: Mix yogurt with salt.
Pour into muslin cloth, tie and hang over bowl.
Leave in refrigerator 24-48 hours to strain.
Remove from cloth into bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Serve with za'atar, olives and warm bread.

298.name: Chicken Biryani Classic
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt, biryani masala and spices.
Cook chicken in oil until half done.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer rice over chicken.
Add fried onions, saffron milk, ghee and herbs.
Seal and dum cook 25 minutes.

299.name: Raspberry Lemonade
instructions: Blend raspberries and strain through sieve.
Make simple syrup with sugar and 1/2 cup water.
Mix lemon juice, raspberry puree and simple syrup.
Add cold water and adjust sweetness.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices and mint.

300.name: Chicken Pasta Bake
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Sauté onion, garlic and chicken.
Add passata and herbs, simmer 10 minutes.
Mix sauce with pasta.
Transfer to baking dish.
Top with mozzarella and parmesan, bake 25 minutes at 200°C.

301.name: Besan Ka Halwa
instructions: Make sugar syrup by boiling sugar and water.
Heat ghee in heavy pan.
Add gram flour and roast on low heat until golden and fragrant.
Carefully add hot sugar syrup, stir constantly.
Cook until halwa leaves pan sides.
Add cardamom and nuts, serve.

302.name: Fish and Chips
ingredients: Beer batter: flour, beer, salt, pepper
instructions: Cut potatoes into thick chips, parboil 5 minutes.
Deep fry chips until crispy and golden.
Make beer batter to coating consistency.
Dip fish in batter, fry until golden 5-6 minutes.
Drain both on paper towels.
Serve with tartare sauce, peas and lemon.

303.name: Chicken Kofta
instructions: Mix all ingredients except oil together well.
Shape into elongated koftas.
Thread onto skewers or pan fry.
Grill or fry until cooked and golden.
Serve with yogurt dip and naan.
Squeeze lemon juice over before eating.

304.name: Caprese Salad
instructions: Arrange alternating tomato and mozzarella slices.
Tuck basil leaves between slices.
Drizzle generously with olive oil.
Add balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
Serve immediately with bread.

305.name: Masala Chai
instructions: Boil water with cardamom, cinnamon, cloves and ginger.
Add tea leaves and brew 3 minutes.
Add milk and sugar.
Bring to boil once.
Strain into cups.
Serve hot.

306.name: Paneer Tikka
instructions: Marinate paneer and vegetables in spiced yogurt 2 hours.
Thread onto skewers alternating with vegetables.
Grill or pan fry until nicely charred.
Squeeze lemon juice over.
Serve with mint chutney.
Garnish with onion rings and lemon.

307.name: Beef Kebab
instructions: Mix beef with all spices, onion and chilies.
Knead well and refrigerate 1 hour.
Shape into long kebabs around skewers.
Grill over charcoal or in oven.
Cook turning until evenly browned.
Serve with chutney and naan.

308.name: Eggs Benedict
ingredients: Hollandaise sauce: egg yolks, butter, lemon, cayenne
instructions: Make hollandaise by whisking egg yolks with lemon over bain marie, slowly add melted butter.
Toast English muffins.
Pan fry Canadian bacon until golden.
Poach eggs in simmering acidulated water.
Assemble: muffin, bacon, poached egg.
Spoon hollandaise over, garnish with parsley.

309.name: Mango Ice Cream
instructions: Puree mango until smooth.
Whip cream to stiff peaks.
Fold condensed milk into cream.
Fold in mango puree gently.
Add cardamom and salt.
Freeze in airtight container for 6 hours.

310.name: Garam Masala Roasted Cauliflower
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Cut cauliflower into florets.
Toss with olive oil and all spices.
Spread on baking tray in single layer.
Roast 25-30 minutes until charred edges.
Serve with yogurt dip and lemon juice.

311.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Finely dice onion, carrot and celery, sauté until soft.
Add garlic and beef, brown well.
Add wine and let it evaporate.
Add tomatoes and paste, simmer 45 minutes.
Cook spaghetti until al dente.
Serve sauce over pasta with parmesan.

312.name: Karahi Gosht
instructions: Heat oil in heavy karahi, add mutton.
Brown mutton on high heat.
Add ginger and garlic, cook 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, cook until pulpy.
Add spices, cover and cook 45 minutes.
Cook uncovered until oil separates, garnish.

313.name: Pancakes
instructions: Mix dry ingredients in large bowl.
Whisk eggs, milk, butter and vanilla.
Pour wet into dry, mix until just combined (lumps ok).
Heat griddle on medium, butter lightly.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake.
Cook until bubbles form, flip once, cook 1 minute more.

314.name: Pani Puri
ingredients: For pani: 2 cups mint, 1 cup coriander, 2 green chilies, 1 tsp cumin, black salt, tamarind, water
instructions: Blend pani ingredients with water, strain and chill.
Mix chickpeas and potatoes with spices.
Make a small hole on top of each puri.
Fill with chickpea mix.
Pour cold pani inside.
Eat immediately in one bite.

315.name: Iced Coffee
instructions: Brew strong espresso and let cool.
Fill glass with ice cubes.
Pour espresso over ice.
Add milk and simple syrup.
Stir well to combine.
Top with whipped cream if desired.

316.name: Cheeseburger
instructions: Form beef into patties, season generously.
Grill or pan fry to desired doneness.
Place cheese on top last minute.
Toast burger buns.
Spread sauces on buns.
Assemble with all toppings and serve.

317.name: Vegetable Pulao
ingredients: Mixed vegetables: peas, carrots, beans, corn
Whole spices: cumin, cardamom, cinnamon, cloves
instructions: Heat oil, fry whole spices.
Add onion until golden.
Add vegetables and stir fry 5 minutes.
Add washed rice and broth.
Cook covered on low heat until rice done.
Rest 10 minutes, garnish with mint.

318.name: Creme Brulee
instructions: Preheat oven to 150°C.
Heat cream with vanilla until just simmering.
Whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale.
Pour cream slowly into yolks, whisk constantly.
Strain into ramekins.
Bake in water bath 35 minutes, cool, refrigerate 4 hours, then caramelize sugar on top.

319.name: Lamb Chops
instructions: Score lamb chops and marinate in spiced yogurt for 4 hours.
Remove from marinade, shake off excess.
Grill on high heat 4-5 minutes per side.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with mint chutney and salad.
Squeeze lemon juice over.

320.name: Falsa Sharbat
instructions: Blend falsa with a little water.
Strain through fine sieve.
Mix with remaining water and sugar.
Add black salt and cumin powder.
Add lemon juice to taste.
Serve over ice garnished with mint.

321.name: Thai Green Curry
instructions: Fry curry paste in oil until fragrant.
Add half the coconut milk and cook.
Add chicken and cook through.
Add remaining coconut milk, lime leaves and vegetables.
Season with fish sauce and sugar.
Stir in Thai basil, serve with rice.

322.name: Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch spinach and blend to puree.
Fry paneer until golden, set aside.
Cook onion and ginger garlic in oil.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook well.
Add spinach puree, simmer 10 minutes.
Add paneer and cream, serve.

323.name: Oatmeal with Toppings
ingredients: Toppings: sliced banana, berries, honey, almond butter, chia seeds, granola
instructions: Bring milk to simmer in saucepan.
Add oats and salt, stir.
Cook 5 minutes stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat, add cinnamon.
Transfer to bowl.
Top with desired toppings and serve.

324.name: Chicken Wings
ingredients: For dry rub: paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, pepper
Buffalo sauce: hot sauce, butter, garlic
instructions: Pat wings dry, toss with dry rub.
Bake at 220°C for 45 minutes turning halfway.
Melt butter, mix with hot sauce and garlic.
Toss hot wings in buffalo sauce.
Serve with celery and blue cheese dip.
Alternative: deep fry wings until crispy.

325.name: Panna Cotta
ingredients: Raspberry coulis: raspberries, sugar, lemon juice
instructions: Bloom gelatin in 3 tbsp cold water.
Heat cream, sugar and vanilla until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat, stir in gelatin.
Pour into oiled ramekins.
Refrigerate 4 hours until set.
Turn out onto plates and serve with raspberry coulis.

326.name: Minestrone Soup
instructions: Sauté onion, carrot and celery in olive oil.
Add garlic, then tomatoes and broth.
Add parmesan rind and simmer 20 minutes.
Add beans and pasta, cook 10 more minutes.
Add zucchini in last 5 minutes.
Remove rind, season, garnish with basil and parmesan.

327.name: Chicken Handi
instructions: Fry onions until deep golden in clay handi or heavy pot.
Add ginger garlic, tomatoes and spices.
Add chicken and cook until white.
Add yogurt and cook 20 minutes.
Add cream and simmer until thick.
Serve directly from handi.

328.name: Frozen Yogurt
instructions: Whisk yogurt, honey and vanilla together.
Pour into freezer-safe container.
Freeze 2 hours, then stir vigorously.
Repeat 2 more times every 2 hours.
Or churn in ice cream maker 25 minutes.
Serve with fresh fruit toppings.

329.name: Miso Ramen
instructions: Bring broth to boil, whisk in miso paste.
Cook noodles separately, drain.
Slice cooked meat thinly.
Divide noodles into bowls.
Ladle miso broth over noodles.
Arrange toppings: meat, egg, corn, nori, spring onions.

330.name: Afghani Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in cream, yogurt and spices overnight.
Heat oil in pan, add chicken with marinade.
Cook on medium heat covered 20 minutes.
Add nut paste and stir well.
Cook until sauce thickens.
Serve with naan.

331.name: Roasted Vegetable Wrap
instructions: Toss vegetables with olive oil, salt and herbs.
Roast at 200°C for 25 minutes.
Warm tortillas.
Spread hummus on each tortilla.
Layer roasted vegetables, feta and rocket.
Drizzle balsamic, roll tightly and serve.

332.name: Lamb Biryani
instructions: Marinate lamb with yogurt and biryani masala.
Cook lamb in oil until half done.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer rice and lamb alternately.
Add fried onions, saffron milk and ghee.
Dum cook on low heat 30 minutes.

333.name: Boba Tea
ingredients: Optional: matcha powder or taro powder
instructions: Boil tapioca pearls per package until soft, drain.
Coat pearls in brown sugar syrup.
Brew strong tea and cool.
Mix tea with milk and sugar syrup.
Add ice to glass, scoop in pearls.
Pour tea mixture over, add wide straw.

334.name: Phirni
instructions: Bring milk to boil in heavy pan.
Add ground rice paste, stir constantly.
Cook until thickened, about 20 minutes.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add cardamom, saffron and rose water.
Pour into clay bowls, garnish with nuts, refrigerate 4 hours.

335.name: Jackfruit Curry
instructions: Boil jackfruit until tender, shred with forks.
Fry onions until golden.
Add ginger garlic and tomatoes.
Add spices and cook until oil separates.
Add jackfruit and coconut milk.
Simmer 15 minutes, garnish and serve.

336.name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
instructions: Cook spaghetti until al dente, reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Gently fry garlic in olive oil until golden (do not burn).
Add red pepper flakes.
Add pasta and pasta water, toss vigorously.
Add parsley and season.
Serve immediately with parmesan.

337.name: Lahori Chargha
instructions: Make deep cuts all over chicken.
Marinate in spiced yogurt 6 hours.
Steam marinated chicken 30 minutes.
Deep fry whole chicken until golden red.
Alternatively bake at 220°C.
Serve with fries, raita and lemon.

338.name: Pumpkin Soup
instructions: Roast pumpkin at 200°C for 40 minutes.
Sauté onion, garlic and ginger in oil.
Add cumin and nutmeg, cook 1 minute.
Add roasted pumpkin and broth.
Simmer 10 minutes, blend until smooth.
Stir in coconut cream, season, serve with seeds.

339.name: Doodh Patti Chai
instructions: Pour milk in saucepan on medium heat.
Add tea leaves and cardamom.
Bring to boil, lower heat.
Simmer 5 minutes until deep brown.
Add sugar and ginger.
Strain and serve very hot.

340.name: BBQ Ribs
ingredients: Dry rub: brown sugar, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, pepper
instructions: Apply dry rub generously all over ribs.
Wrap in foil and bake at 150°C for 3 hours.
Open foil, brush with BBQ sauce.
Grill or broil 15 minutes until caramelized.
Rest 5 minutes before cutting.
Serve with extra sauce and coleslaw.

341.name: Shahi Tukda
instructions: Fry bread slices until golden, drain.
Reduce milk with sugar, saffron and cardamom to rabri.
Add condensed milk and rose water.
Arrange fried bread in dish.
Pour warm rabri over bread.
Garnish with nuts and silver leaf, refrigerate 2 hours.

342.name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic and carrots in olive oil.
Add all spices, cook 1 minute.
Add lentils, tomatoes and 5 cups water.
Bring to boil, simmer 25 minutes.
Blend half the soup for creamier texture.
Season with lemon juice and serve with bread.

343.name: Katakat
instructions: Clean all offal thoroughly.
Heat oil in flat griddle (tawa).
Add ginger garlic paste and tomatoes.
Add offal pieces and cook on high heat.
Chop and mix continuously making the kata-kata sound.
Add spices, cook until dry and done.

344.name: French Toast
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla and cinnamon.
Dip bread slices in egg mixture each side.
Melt butter in non-stick pan on medium heat.
Fry bread until golden on both sides.
Dust with powdered sugar.
Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries.

345.name: Chicken Donuts
instructions: Cut chicken into strips, marinate in buttermilk and hot sauce 2 hours.
Mix flour, cornstarch and spices.
Dredge chicken in spiced flour.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.
Drizzle with honey.
Serve with spicy mayo.

346.name: Basbousa
ingredients: Sugar syrup: 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup water, rose water, lemon
instructions: Mix semolina, coconut, sugar, yogurt, butter and baking powder.
Spread in greased baking tin.
Press almonds on top.
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.
Make syrup, boil until slightly thick.
Pour hot syrup over hot cake, let absorb.

347.name: Chicken Pasta Carbonara
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente, save pasta water.
Fry pancetta until crispy, add garlic.
Add chicken and cook through.
Mix egg yolks, whole egg and parmesan.
Off heat, add pasta to pancetta pan.
Add egg mixture, toss with pasta water to create creamy sauce.

348.name: Chicken Chaat
instructions: Mix shredded chicken with half the spices.
Arrange on serving plate.
Pour yogurt over chicken.
Drizzle both chutneys.
Sprinkle remaining spices.
Top with vegetables, sev and coriander.

349.name: Shakkar Para
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, cardamom and oil.
Add water gradually to make stiff dough.
Roll out to medium thickness.
Cut into small diamond or square shapes.
Deep fry on low-medium heat until golden.
Drain and cool — they crisp up as they cool.

350.name: Coconut Rice
instructions: Rinse rice until water runs clear.
Combine rice, coconut milk, water, salt and sugar.
Add pandan leaves.
Bring to boil, then cover and simmer on lowest heat.
Cook until liquid absorbed, about 18 minutes.
Fluff and serve with cucumber and sambal.

351.name: Tuna Salad Sandwich
instructions: Drain tuna thoroughly.
Mix tuna with mayo, celery and onion.
Add lemon juice and mustard.
Season with salt and pepper.
Toast bread slices.
Assemble with lettuce, tomato and tuna filling.

352.name: Matka Kulfi
instructions: Reduce milk by boiling down to half.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add vermicelli and cook 5 minutes.
Add cardamom, saffron and rose water.
Pour into small matka pots or cups.
Freeze 8 hours until solid.

353.name: Gazpacho
instructions: Roughly chop all vegetables.
Blend until smooth.
Add olive oil and vinegar.
Season well with salt and pepper.
Add ice water to thin if needed.
Chill thoroughly and serve cold with croutons.

354.name: Mutton Yakhni Pulao
ingredients: Whole spices: cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, bay leaves, peppercorns, cumin
instructions: Boil mutton with whole spices to make yakhni (broth).
Strain broth, reserve mutton.
Fry onions golden, add ginger garlic and mutton.
Add yogurt and cook 10 minutes.
Add 3 cups yakhni and washed rice.
Cook covered until done.

355.name: Suji Ka Halwa
instructions: Boil water and sugar together to make syrup.
Heat ghee in heavy pan, fry semolina until golden.
Very carefully add hot syrup (it will splutter).
Stir continuously on low heat.
Add cardamom, raisins and nuts.
Cook until halwa comes away from pan.

356.name: Chicken Satay
ingredients: Satay marinade: soy sauce, turmeric, cumin, coriander, garlic, lemongrass
Peanut sauce: peanut butter, coconut milk, soy, lime, chili
instructions: Marinate chicken strips for 2 hours.
Soak bamboo skewers in water 30 minutes.
Thread chicken onto skewers.
Grill or pan fry until cooked with char marks.
Make peanut sauce by simmering all ingredients.
Serve with peanut sauce and cucumber.

357.name: Dum Gosht
instructions: Marinate mutton with yogurt, spices and fried onions.
Put in heavy pot with oil.
Seal lid with dough.
Cook on high heat 10 minutes, then lowest heat 1.5 hours.
Break seal at table for aroma.
Serve with naan.

358.name: Granola
instructions: Preheat oven to 150°C.
Mix oats, nuts and seeds.
Warm honey, oil, vanilla and cinnamon, pour over oats.
Spread on lined baking tray.
Bake 30 minutes, stirring halfway.
Cool completely then mix in dried fruits.

359.name: Shrimp Tacos
instructions: Season shrimp with lime, cumin and chili.
Cook in hot pan 2 minutes per side.
Warm tortillas.
Spread chipotle mayo on each tortilla.
Add shrimp, coleslaw and avocado.
Top with cilantro and pickled jalapenos.

360.name: Vegetable Biryani
ingredients: Mixed vegetables: cauliflower, peas, carrots, beans, potatoes
instructions: Marinate vegetables in yogurt and biryani masala.
Cook vegetables in masala until half done.
Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer rice and vegetables.
Add fried onions, saffron milk and ghee.
Steam 20 minutes, serve.

361.name: Almond Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 170°C, grease cake tin.
Beat butter and sugar until fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time.
Fold in ground almonds, baking powder and salt.
Add almond extract.
Pour into tin, top with flaked almonds, bake 35 minutes.

362.name: Chilled Mint Lemonade
instructions: Muddle mint leaves with a little sugar.
Mix lemon juice and sugar syrup.
Add cold water and mix.
Add muddled mint.
Pour over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices and mint sprigs.

363.name: Chicken Makhani
ingredients: For marinade: yogurt, ginger garlic, lemon, chili
For makhani sauce: tomatoes, butter, cream, cashews, ginger, garlic, spices
instructions: Grill marinated chicken until slightly charred.
Blend tomatoes, cashews, butter and spices for sauce.
Cook sauce until thick.
Add cream and adjust consistency.
Add grilled chicken, simmer 15 minutes.
Finish with fenugreek and butter.

364.name: Zucchini Fritters
instructions: Salt grated zucchini, let sit 15 minutes, then squeeze out moisture.
Mix zucchini with eggs, flour, feta and herbs.
Season well.
Heat oil in pan on medium.
Drop spoonfuls into pan, flatten.
Fry until golden both sides, serve with yogurt.

365.name: Beef Nihari
instructions: Heat ghee, add ginger garlic and fried onions.
Add beef and brown well.
Add nihari masala and chili powder.
Add 6 cups water and simmer 3-4 hours.
Mix flour with water, add to thicken.
Cook 30 more minutes, garnish and serve with naan.

366.name: Coconut Macaroons
instructions: Preheat oven to 170°C, line baking tray.
Mix coconut, condensed milk and vanilla.
Whip egg whites with salt to stiff peaks.
Fold egg whites into coconut mixture.
Scoop mounds onto tray.
Bake 15 minutes until golden, dip bases in chocolate.

367.name: Vietnamese Pho
ingredients: Pho broth: bones, star anise, cloves, cinnamon, ginger, onion
instructions: Simmer broth with charred onion, ginger and whole spices for 3 hours.
Strain broth, season with fish sauce.
Cook rice noodles, drain.
Divide noodles into bowls.
Ladle hot broth over raw beef to cook it.
Add fresh garnishes and sauces at table.

368.name: Raita
instructions: Squeeze moisture from grated cucumber.
Whisk yogurt until smooth.
Mix in cucumber and tomato.
Season with cumin, chili and salt.
Garnish with mint and coriander.
Refrigerate until serving with biryani.

369.name: Pizza Margherita
ingredients: Tomato sauce: canned tomatoes, garlic, basil, salt
instructions: Preheat oven to highest setting with pizza stone.
Stretch dough to thin circle.
Spread tomato sauce, not too thick.
Tear mozzarella and distribute.
Slide onto hot stone or tray.
Bake 10-12 minutes until charred, add fresh basil.

370.name: Chilla
instructions: Mix gram flour with water to thin batter.
Add onion, chilies, tomato, coriander and cumin.
Season with salt.
Heat flat pan, drizzle oil.
Pour ladle of batter, spread thinly.
Cook until set and golden, flip and cook other side.

371.name: Beef Stew
instructions: Dredge beef in flour, brown in batches.
Sauté vegetables.
Add tomato paste, wine and broth.
Return beef, add herbs.
Simmer 2 hours covered.
Add potatoes last 30 minutes, season and serve.

372.name: Mithai Box
ingredients: Ladoo: gram flour, ghee, sugar, cardamom, nuts
instructions: For barfi: Cook khoya with sugar until thick, spread and cut.
For ladoo: Roast gram flour in ghee, mix sugar and shape.
For halwa: Roast semolina in ghee, add syrup.
Prepare each mithai separately.
Arrange in gift box.
Garnish with silver leaf and nuts.

373.name: Sparkling Strawberry Limeade
instructions: Blend strawberries until smooth, strain.
Mix strawberry puree with lime juice and sugar syrup.
Pour into glasses over ice.
Top with sparkling water.
Stir gently.
Garnish with lime and mint.

374.name: Prawn Malai Curry
instructions: Marinate prawns with turmeric and salt.
Fry onion until translucent.
Add ginger garlic paste and spices.
Cook 3 minutes until fragrant.
Add coconut milk and bring to simmer.
Add prawns, cook 5 minutes until pink, serve.

375.name: Capriccio Salad
ingredients: Poppy seed dressing: honey, vinegar, oil, mustard, poppy seeds
instructions: Wash and dry lettuce.
Slice strawberries.
Make dressing by whisking all dressing ingredients.
Arrange lettuce on plate.
Top with strawberries, nuts and goat cheese.
Drizzle dressing just before serving.

376.name: Naan
instructions: Dissolve yeast with sugar in warm water, wait 10 minutes.
Mix flour, salt, yogurt and oil.
Add yeast mixture, knead 8 minutes.
Cover and rest 1 hour.
Divide into balls, roll into oval shapes.
Cook on very hot griddle or tandoor, brush with butter.

377.name: Greek Salad
instructions: Combine tomatoes, cucumber, onion, pepper and olives.
Dress with olive oil and vinegar.
Season with oregano, salt and pepper.
Toss gently.
Place block of feta on top.
Drizzle feta with more olive oil and oregano.

378.name: Fruit Custard
ingredients: Mixed fruit: banana, apple, mango, pomegranate, grapes
instructions: Mix custard powder with a little cold milk.
Heat remaining milk with sugar.
Add custard paste, stir until thick.
Cool completely.
Fold in mixed fruits gently.
Top with cream and nuts, refrigerate and serve.

379.name: Chicken Wrap
instructions: Slice grilled chicken into strips.
Warm tortillas.
Spread hummus on each tortilla.
Layer chicken, lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber.
Add onion, feta and olives.
Add tzatziki, roll tightly and serve.

380.name: Fish Karahi
instructions: Heat oil in karahi, add ginger garlic.
Add tomatoes and cook until pulpy.
Add all spices and mix.
Add fish gently, cook without stirring too much.
Cover and cook 10 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and ginger, serve.

381.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Beat butter and sugars until fluffy.
Add eggs and vanilla, mix well.
Add flour, baking soda and salt.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Scoop onto lined tray, bake 12 minutes until just golden.

382.name: Lemon Garlic Asparagus
instructions: Trim woody ends from asparagus.
Heat olive oil in large pan.
Add asparagus and cook on high heat 4 minutes.
Add garlic, cook 1 minute.
Add lemon juice, toss.
Season, top with parmesan and pepper flakes.

383.name: Mutton Seekh Kebab
instructions: Mix mince with all spices, onion and fried onions.
Refrigerate 1 hour.
Take portions and shape along metal skewers.
Grill on charcoal or in oven.
Rotate and cook evenly.
Serve with chutney and onion rings.

384.name: Hummus
ingredients: Paprika and olive oil to serve
instructions: Drain chickpeas, save liquid.
Blend tahini and lemon juice until fluffy.
Add garlic and chickpeas, blend.
Add olive oil, cumin and salt.
Add ice water spoon by spoon until silky.
Serve in bowl with olive oil and paprika.

385.name: Rasmalai
ingredients: For rabri: 1 liter milk reduced, sugar, cardamom, saffron, nuts
instructions: Curdle milk with lemon, strain to make chenna.
Knead chenna smooth, shape into flat discs.
Boil in sugar syrup 15 minutes until doubled.
Reduce 1 liter milk with sugar and saffron to rabri.
Place cooked rasgullas in rabri.
Garnish with nuts and serve chilled.

386.name: Kung Pao Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken with soy sauce and cornflour.
Fry dried chilies and peanuts briefly.
Stir fry chicken in batches until golden.
Add garlic and ginger.
Add chili bean paste, vinegar and sugar.
Return chicken and peanuts, toss and serve.

387.name: Achari Gosht
ingredients: Whole spices: nigella seeds, fenugreek seeds, mustard seeds
instructions: Heat oil, fry mustard and nigella seeds.
Add onions and cook until golden.
Add mutton and brown well.
Add yogurt, tomatoes and achari masala.
Cook until oil separates.
Add water and simmer until mutton tender.

388.name: Pomegranate Mocktail
instructions: Mix pomegranate, orange and lime juices.
Add grenadine.
Pour over ice in glass.
Top with soda water.
Stir gently.
Garnish with pomegranate seeds, orange slice and mint.

389.name: Rasgulla
ingredients: Sugar syrup: 1.5 cups sugar, 5 cups water, 1 tsp rose water
instructions: Boil milk and add lemon juice to curdle.
Strain through muslin cloth, wash curd under cold water.
Knead chenna for 10 minutes until smooth.
Roll into smooth balls.
Boil in sugar syrup 15-20 minutes until doubled.
Cool in syrup and refrigerate.

390.name: Shakarpara
instructions: Mix flour, ghee, sugar and cardamom.
Add milk gradually, knead firm dough.
Roll to medium thickness.
Cut into small diamonds.
Deep fry on low heat until golden.
Cool before storing.

391.name: Pea and Ham Soup
instructions: Sauté vegetables until softened.
Add split peas, ham and broth.
Add herbs and bring to boil.
Simmer 1 hour until peas are very soft.
Remove ham, shred meat and return.
Blend half for thick texture, season.

392.name: Mutton Chops
instructions: Score mutton chops and marinate overnight.
Bring to room temperature before cooking.
Grill on high heat 5-6 minutes per side.
Alternatively cook in oven at 200°C.
Rest 5 minutes.
Sprinkle chaat masala and serve with salad.

393.name: Lemon Posset
instructions: Bring cream and sugar to boil, stirring.
Boil 3 minutes, stir constantly.
Remove from heat, add lemon juice and zest.
Stir and let cool slightly.
Pour into serving glasses.
Refrigerate 4 hours until set, serve with berries.

394.name: Sabudana Khichdi
instructions: Rinse soaked sabudana, ensure each pearl is separate.
Crush peanuts coarsely.
Heat oil, fry cumin and curry leaves.
Add green chilies and potatoes, stir.
Add sabudana and mix gently.
Cook stirring until pearls are translucent, add lemon juice.

395.name: Spring Rolls
instructions: Stir fry vegetables and chicken with garlic, ginger and soy.
Cool filling completely.
Place filling on wrapper, roll tightly tucking sides.
Seal edge with water.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.
Serve with sweet chili sauce.

396.name: Karahi Prawn
instructions: Heat oil in karahi, add ginger garlic paste.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add spices and cook until oil separates.
Add prawns and toss well.
Cook on high heat until prawns are curled and cooked.
Garnish with ginger, green chilies and coriander.

397.name: Date Shake
instructions: Soak dates in warm water 10 minutes.
Blend dates with a little milk until smooth.
Add remaining milk and ice cream.
Add cinnamon and cardamom.
Blend until creamy.
Pour into glasses, drizzle with honey.

398.name: Duck Confit
ingredients: Duck fat or olive oil to cover
instructions: Season duck generously with salt 24 hours ahead.
Place in baking dish with herbs and garlic.
Cover with duck fat.
Slow cook at 120°C for 3 hours.
Remove duck, crisp skin in hot pan.
Serve with sautéed potatoes and salad.

399.name: Anday Wala Burger
instructions: Cook chicken patties until done.
Fry eggs sunny side up.
Toast buns with butter.
Layer bottom bun with mayo and chatni.
Add lettuce, tomato, onion.
Place patty, cheese, then egg on top.

400.name: Khichri
instructions: Soak rice and dal together 30 minutes.
Heat ghee, fry cumin seeds.
Add onion until golden.
Add turmeric and coriander, stir.
Add drained rice and dal with water.
Cook covered until soft and porridge-like.

401.name: Red Velvet Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Mix dry ingredients together.
Whisk wet ingredients separately.
Combine both mixtures.
Pour into two greased cake tins.
Bake 30 minutes, cool completely, frost with cream cheese.

402.name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake
ingredients: For cake: 200g butter, 200g sugar, 3 eggs, 200g flour, 1 tsp baking powder, vanilla
instructions: Melt butter in oven-proof pan.
Add brown sugar, arrange pineapple rings and cherries.
Make cake batter, pour over fruit.
Bake at 180°C for 35 minutes.
Cool 10 minutes, then invert onto plate.
Serve warm with cream.

403.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
instructions: Halve and deseed peppers.
Brown meat with onion, garlic and spices.
Add tomatoes and rice, cook 10 minutes.
Fill pepper halves with meat mixture.
Top with mozzarella.
Bake covered at 180°C for 30 minutes, uncover last 10 minutes.

404.name: Rooh Afza Sharbat
instructions: Soak basil seeds in water for 15 minutes.
Add Rooh Afza syrup to glass.
Add soaked basil seeds.
Pour cold milk over.
Add ice cubes.
Garnish with rose petals and pistachios.

405.name: Beef Nihari Naan Roll
instructions: Warm naan on flat griddle.
Place pulled nihari meat on naan.
Add onion rings and green chilies.
Drizzle mint chutney.
Squeeze lemon juice.
Sprinkle chaat masala and roll.

406.name: Pasta Primavera
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Roast vegetables with olive oil at 200°C for 20 minutes.
Sauté garlic in olive oil.
Add pasta and roasted vegetables.
Add lemon zest, juice and parmesan.
Season, toss with fresh basil.
